Student Hostels-



Students at IIT Kharagpur are housed in 21 Residential Halls named after notable Indian figures such as Lal Bahadur Shastry, Indira Gandhi, Vallabhai Patel, and Zakir Hussain, among others.

There are 16 boys' halls and 5 girls' halls.







Hostel Facilities:

IIT Kharagpur hostels are fully wifi

Mess facility

24 hours security

Separate mess

Medical facilities



Campus facilities-



Library- 



Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) is a technical institute in India The Central Library in Kharagpur is one of Asia's largest technological libraries.



The library system is entirely computerized, and customers can use wide-area network facilities to access foreign university libraries.







Guesthouse- 



There are four guest homes at the Institute, three on campus and one in Kolkata. All of the guest houses have regular catering services.





        

 Food- 



Catering is available in all Halls of Residence and Guesthouses on a regular basis. Sahara, Dreamland, Veggies, Super-Duper, Tikka, Bill's Restaurant, and others are some of the other places to eat. 

Some canteens located within the Institute, serve tea, coffee, soft drinks and light snacks.

            

      

Gym- 



There are also separate gyms for girls and boys on campus.

           

        

 Bank-



Within the campus, there are three banks.

          

         

 Auditorium- 



On campus, there are three auditoriums where cultural competitions and activities take place all year.



      

 Sports complex-



IIT Kharagpur wants its students to be the greatest in all they do, thus it provides them with world-class sports and games facilities.

Jnan Ghosh and Tata Sports Complex are two stadiums on campus that are used for various sports like hockey, football, cricket, and athletics.

A fully modernized Aquatic Center is also available on campus for sports such as swimming and water polo. 

              

 



Extracurricular activities-



Because the institute believes in the holistic development of the individual, it fosters a wide range of extracurricular activities in addition to academics.

As a result, cultural, sports, and technological festivals are commonplace. The following is a brief outline of the activities that take place at IIT Kharagpur.





Extracurricular activities-



Druheen

   

The Bengali Technology Dramatic Society (BTDS) of IIT Kharagpur is formally known as Druheen. It belongs to the Dramatics Subcommittee of the Social and Cultural Committee and is one of the dramatic societies for technology students. One of IIT Kharagpur's oldest societies is this one.

Western Technology Music Society

            

One of the two official music societies of IIT Kharagpur, the Western Technology Music Society (or WTMS for short), oversees the western music scene on campus. The group strives to promote a variety of musical genres, support and encourage musicians, foster the expression of values and ideas via music, and foster good musical taste among our audience.



Debating Society

  

The IIT Kharagpur Debating Society, also known as DebSoc, is the university's competitive debate team. It regularly competes successfully in parliamentary debates around the globe and has previously hosted the IIT Kharagpur Model UN Conference and the IIT Kharagpur Parliamentary Debate.



Technology Robotix Society







A focal point for robotics-related activities and projects on campus, the Technology Robotix Society (abbreviated TRS) is a recognised organization within the Technology Students' Gymkhana at IIT Kharagpur. It has solidified its status as one of the hubs of amateur robotics in India, with its reach growing gradually each year.

Business Club

             

The on-campus association for all things business at IIT Kharagpur is called the Business Club, or B-Club for short. It is a knowledge-sharing platform for like-minded people that uses a "knowledge-session" methodology. Additionally, the Club engages with the student body through Open House events and, to a greater extent, the wider public through programmes like the Financial Literacy Drive.



 Placement Statistics-

These cafeterias provide healthy &  good meals at affordable costs.





 Gym-

Students at IIT-Roorkee also have access to a gym. So that they can maintain their fitness.







        

  Bank facility -

The Punjab National Bank (P.N.B.) and the State Bank of India both have branches on campus (S.B.I.).

Both banks offer centralized banking services, as well as Internet banking and ATM services.





           

Auditorium- 

The auditorium at IIT Roorkee is available for events and seminars.





Medical/Hospital-

Students, staff, and teachers can use the hospital's 50 beds for emergency, ECG, general health care, and x-ray services.

Dental facilities, as well as specific treatment such as pathology and physiotherapy consultations, are offered.





 Extracurricular Activities







UBA

We are an IIT Roorkee student body that has been motivated by the idea of a revolutionary shift in rural development to contribute to the construction of an inclusive India.



           



COGNIZANCE 

The Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee hosts Cognizance every year. Gather here to learn. Come together to grow. Join forces to learn. Come, be cognizant.





GEEK GAZETTE



The official technical journal of IIT Roorkee, Geek Gazette, features articles that have been carefully chosen for the enthusiastic, tech-savvy, and esteemed residents of IIT Roorkee and beyond.







NCC



Students at IIT Roorkee have the chance to join the NCC. The NCC's 3UK CTR (3 Uttarakhand Composite Technical Regiment) is made up of Institute cadets.





SAC

A vibrant, student-run organization that interacts with, supports, and speaks for the diverse student body at IIT Roorkee.



SHARE

Sharing Analysis of Regional Economies, or ShARE, is a multicultural, non-profit organization for students that brings together gifted kids and world leaders to talk about international economic concerns..



Cultural Council

All of the institute's annual cultural activities are organised by the student body's Cultural Council or Cultural Societies, sometimes known as "Cul-Soc."



Dramatics Section

Since its establishment, this division has produced plays of unrivaled caliber and is renowned for its discipline and organization.

6- Placements

full_content:
INDIAN INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, GUWAHATI

                       

The Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, or IIT Guwahati, was founded by the Indian government in 1994 as the country's sixth IIT.

IIT Guwahati, like the other IITs, is ranked 41 in the 'Research Citations per Faculty' category by QS World University Rankings 2022.







Important information regarding IIT Guwahati-



Location-



Address - Suryamukhi Road, North, Amingaon, Guwahati, Assam 781039

The IIT Guwahati campus is located on the northern bank of the Brahmaputra River, bordering the North Guwahati village of Amingaon.



Campus map link - 

https://maps.app.goo.gl/RwK233B4Jw9cPV5Y9





campus size- 700 acres



Reaching IIT Guwahati-

Student Hostel- 



Every student at IIT Guwahati has his or her own room. Every hostel has a distinct history and set of amenities.

There are 9 boys' hostels and 2 girls' hostels.

The hostels are named after North-East Indian rivers and tributaries.

Boys hostel- 

Kapili



Umiam

           

Brahmaputra

            

Lohit

             

Kameng

                 

Siang

        

         

Barak

          

Dihing

          

Manas

           

Girls hostel- 

Dhansiri 

         

Subansiri

          

            

  

Hostel facilities-

24 hours water supply and electricity

Common room

Separate mess

24 hours security

Wi-Fi connectivity

Indoor games

Medical facility



Campus facilities-



Lakshminath Bezbaruah central Library- 



The Lakshminath Bezbaroa Central Library provides library and information services to assist teaching, learning, and research activities by providing cutting-edge facilities and cutting-edge services.

With a rapidly growing collection of books, journals, and magazines in print and digital format, the library provides a doorway to the world of newest information in sciences, engineering, technology, humanities, and social sciences.







Guest house- 



The Institute also offers two big Guest Houses where visitors can stay. Parents of students who wish to visit the campus may make a reservation at one of the Institute Guest Houses, subject to room availability.







.

    Mess and canteen-



 Every hostel has a mess that serves three meals each day, as well as a canteen, which is a place where you pay for what you eat.                  

 



  Sports complex-



Every hostel has a sports room with a variety of sports equipment such as Table Tennis Bats/Balls and Tables, Football, Carrom, and so on. Apart from that, hostels have hockey sticks, cricket bats, badminton racquets, and other sports equipment.

Cricket, volleyball, and other sports are also played on the grounds.

              





   Hospital-

   A hospital with three medical officers is located on campus.







     Banks and ATM- 



Canara Bank and SBI each have a branch, and both have an ATM immediately in front of the banks, which are in the administrative building area.





        Gym Room- 

Basic gym equipment is available in all hostels. If you're a member of the institute's hard core, the gym contains all you'll need.





Extra curricular activities- 



CSEA + Coding Club -



Since the two are closely related and manage the majority of the events together, it is difficult to make a distinction between the two. Regular Hackathons, Tech Talks, and lectures by seniors on a variety of computer science topics, such as Machine Learning, NLP, OOPS, Algorithms, and placement lectures on DS, Algo, interview-cracking, etc., are used to introduce lectures on tools, frameworks, and other topics like git, the MVC model for web development (Django, Web2Py), HTML, PHP, jQuery, and other web technologies. These "CSE-clubs" now provide a wider range of events and activities thanks to the recently established Google Developer Group, which also hosts Google Hackathons and regular talks on Android development.



Cepstrum -



This is the student society that is primarily in charge of almost all of the general talks/lectures aimed at the general campus junta, such as lectures on DS, Algo prior to the placement season for brushing up on coding skills, GD/PI aiding sessions, Internship experience talks by seniors, talk on applying to various intern-programs in the third year like MITACS, DAAD-WISE, etc.



C&A-





Through awareness, skill development, and networking, the Consulting and Analytics Club at IIT Guwahati seeks to ease the transition from graduate school to a fruitful career in management consulting and data analytics.



IITG.ai







A committed group of student volunteers runs this community. Each of them contributes distinct knowledge and experience in a range of AI fields. We want to give like-minded folks a place to meet and exchange ideas. As a result, they will have the necessary theoretical and practical expertise to pursue a career in AI as researchers or developers. We are enthusiastic about the opportunities and difficulties the industry presents, and we think you should be too!



Robotics club





The goal of the robotics club at IIT Guwahati is to bring students together in a learning atmosphere and give them a space to work on both large- and small-scale robotics projects to further their interest in mechanical, electronic, and software design. Having said that, we take delight in discussing our projects because we have covered every angle, whether it be autonomous bots, humanoids, a swarm of tiny robots, robotic arms, or aerial vehicles. The club teaches you a wide range of interpersonal skills that are crucial in daily life, from team-building to cooperation, from perseverance to sincerity. However, the club offers much more than just technical improvement to its members.

IIT Hyderabad is a residential institute, and students who choose to live in the hostels can do so.

The hostels have a unique architecture that makes them feel more like a home than a student hostel.

There are a total of 12 blocks/hostels, with 9 blocks for boys and 3 blocks for girls. (They are, however, side by side.)
campus_facilities:
Library:
The library at IITH is well-equipped, with about 20,000 books and 10,000 periodicals. There are reference books as well as books for normal circulation among the books.

IITH also offers an internal archive of professor and student-authored scientific publications.

Sports:
Everyone can find enough motivation at the institute to excel in any of the many activities and skills accessible. Cricket, volleyball, soccer, basketball, table tennis, and more sports are available.

Other sporting facilities from local stadiums, such as badminton, basketball, swimming, and so on, are also recognised by the college.

Auditorium-



The infrastructure at IIT Hyderabad is well-known. It was developed by Japanese engineers and features numerous huge, air-conditioned classrooms as well as a massive theater that is equally outstanding in terms of area and infrastructure.

     



Mess and canteen- 



Students, employees, and teachers at IITH have access to a communal dining facility. The dining hall offers both north Indian and south Indian cuisine.

Student leaders and wardens inspect the food quality on a regular basis.





Classrooms- 



IIT Hyderabad has well-built air-conditioned classrooms to create a comfortable learning environment for its students.and the internet speed in the classrooms is enough.







Sports Facilities-



Everyone can find enough motivation at the institute to excel in any of the many activities and skills accessible. Cricket, volleyball, soccer, basketball, table tennis, and more sports are available.

Other sporting facilities from local stadiums, such as badminton, basketball, swimming, and so on, are also recognised by the college.





 



Gymnasium-



A physical trainer is offered at the hotel's gym.

A separate mini gym for girls is offered at the girls dormitory, in addition to the general gym that is open to all residents.

               

Yoga- 



For students, instructors, and staff, there is a yoga room with a certified yoga guru. Yoga classes are offered both in the morning and in the evening.

 



      Medical/Hospital-



The IITH clinic has partnered with Apollo for its pharmacy needs on campus. Apollo provides students and faculty with cashless services 24 hours a day, seven days a week, in accordance with CGHS rules. Tesla Diagnostics is in charge of pathology laboratory programmes.







Extra curricular activities- 



We are a group of driven individuals that think case studies and entertaining activities should coexist in a collegiate setting. By giving them a stage on which to display their inner performers—musicians, dancers, actors, painters, authors, photographers, and dreamers—is an attempt to capture the vibrant persona of the students.



The cultural team's job is to organize a wide range of cultural events throughout the year in order to maintain the campus's spirit. We make sure that every event stays in your memory for a lifetime, whether it is the celebration of practically every festival or frequent open-air jam sessions. The IIT Hyderabad's cultural clubs are as follows:



Infocus

Behind the lens

Vibes

Rang de manch

Gesture

Shuffle

LitSoc



Other than that, some of the clubs of IIT Hyderabad are as follows:

INDIAN INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, DHANBAD 

                                               

The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Dhanbad was founded in 1926 and was previously known as the Indian School of Mines before being converted into an IIT. 

IIT Dhanbad, ranked 11 in Engineering category by NIRF & ranked 26 in the overall category by NIRF.







Important information regarding IIT/ISM Dhanbad-



Location-

 

Address- Police Line Road, Main Campus IIT (ISM, near Rani Bandh, Hirapur, Sardar Patel Nagar, Dhanbad, Jharkhand 826004



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/cUJo3N6X2mky1nZY6



Campus size-Dhanbad features a 218-acre complex that is architecturally spectacular, with an additional 225 acres of land under construction.







Reaching IIT Dhanbad- Dhanbad junction is the closest railway station to IIT dhanbad. It is 3.1 km away from the campus. It takes only 8 minutes to reach there.

Campus facilities-



Central Library- 



This is a fully air-conditioned seven-story skyscraper. A reading area on the seventh level and a restaurant on the ground floor are available at the central library.

The library is open 24 hours a day and offers a large collection of books, journals, theses, research papers, and other materials. They also have e-resources that are licensed.









Canteens-



There are numerous canteens as well as a medical center.

Almost every dormitory has its own canteen, and the central library also has one on the ground floor.



Auditorium-



This air-conditioned auditorium is used to host a variety of events, including competitions, workshops, intern speeches, and "Hackfest."







Classrooms-



The classrooms are spacious, air-conditioned, and equipped with microphones and speakers, as well as fast WiFi.

Projectors and digital technology are also carefully maintained.





  Students Activity Center-



Boys and girls have access to a fully equipped gymnasium.

Badminton courts with synthetic floors (4), yoga studio, boxing ring, and billiards room

Clubs for technical and cultural pursuits



 

Sports Complex

Basketball courts.

Volleyball courts.

Tennis courts.

Floodlights.





    Wi-fi-

Wi-Fi facility is available within the campus for students and staff.





Extracurricular activities -



 Robotics & AI Club



Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad has a club or organization called Robotics & AI Club, which is run by students. Students that enjoy building mechanical peers that may even be able to function without human assistance can be found in the robotics club.







QUIZZING CLUB 



This is for you if you have ever been interested in quizzing in any way. Membership is open to all college students. The only criterion is the quiz.



Other than the above clubs, Following are the other clubs at IIT Dhanbad-



Abhaya Dramatics Club

'Manthan' : Music and Singing

LitC : Literary Club

चयनिका : Hindi Literature

AIESEC: Internship and Entrepreneurship

Kartavya : An NGO that aids children in slums

Fast Forward India (Society) : Mostly addresses social issues

ACM : Coding Club

Coding Club ISM Dhanbad

ISM Diaries :  An online journal where you may express your opinions and discuss interests

Astronomy Club 

Snooker Club

Boxing Club

Dhruva Club: Meditation and bettering one's lifestyle

Yoga Club

FotoFreaks : Photography Club

Artfreaks : Club of Artists

Robotics Club

Film Making Club

Udaan :The best career coaching and guidance

Dance Club: LITM (Legends in The Making)

Mailer Daemon : Writing Club for Campus Magazine

ToastMaster: Five-star rated club for improving English, communication skills, and personality.

NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, TIRUCHIRAPALLI (NITT)

                                          



NIT Tiruchirappalli (also known as NIT Trichy) is a public technical and research university in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu. It first opened its doors in 1964.





Through its Vision, Mission, and Core Values, NIT Tiruchirappalli identifies itself as:



An Indian institution with international acclaim.

A worldwide reservoir of talented students, dedicated instructors, and dedicated researchers.

Responding to real-world issues and engineering a better society through a confluence of education and research.

Campus facilities-



Central library-



The Institute features a sophisticated Central Library with over 2.5 lakh materials, including technical books, reports, standards, CD-ROMS, Audio Visual, Educational Cassettes, and journal back issues.

Monday through Friday, from 9.30 a.m. to 5.00 p.m. (On public holidays, the library will be closed.)







Mess-



There are total ten messes-

Hari Catering - South Indian Non Veg – Mega Mess II - GF

Firstman Management Services – South Indian Veg Mega Mess I GF

Marvel Hospitality Services - North Indian Non Veg Mega Mess II FF

Sakthi's Kitchen - North Indian Veg Veg Mega Mess I FF

Sri Sai Krupa Catering - Andhra Menu Annapurna (Amber)

              Megamess-1



Guest house-



Outsiders or guests can stay in the NiT Trichy campus's guest house.

The rooms are modern and well-furnished.













Sports Centre



Students and staff require sporting facilities, which the department supplies and maintains.







Outdoor- 



Two football fields, one hockey field, two volleyball courts, two basketball courts, three tennis courts, and two ball badminton courts can all be found on the site.

Aside from that, each hostel offers its own playground and indoor games like table tennis and carrom.





Indoor-

Indoor Stadiums with two shuttle courts and a few table tennis tables are also available.









Many exercise machines, such as a multi-station gym, treadmill, stairs, air walker, rowing machine, and exercise cycle, are housed at the Fitness Centre, which also has wooden flooring.







Swimming pool- The facility also has a swimming pool for students and employees.





Bank-



Inside the campus is a branch of the State Bank of India (NIT branch). It is fully computerised and provides NITT with a comprehensive service.



Two ATMs have been installed on campus, one near Barn Hall and the other near the Shopping Complex.



              



Post office-



The Shopping Complex has a fully equipped Post Office with Speed Post service.

         



Security-











Hospital-



The institute hospital is located on campus, in the middle of the academic zone and the hostel/residential zone.

The NITT Hospital provides primary health treatment 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

NITT Hospital offers emergency, OP, and IP services, as well as a fully equipped ambulance that is available 24 hours a day, a pharmacy that is open 24 hours a day, and a clinical laboratory that is open from 7:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m.





Extracurricular activity-  



A group of students known as PSI Racing Club are dedicated to creating off-road buggies from the ground up.



A group of passionate programmers, problem solvers, computer nerds, developers, and technical architects make up Web Cell (Delta Force).



A group of individuals who are passionate about innovation and technology make up the NIT Trichy Spider R&D Club.



The club for astronomy and science (Nakshatra)



The Aero Modelling Club creates and designs a wide range of models, including autonomous drones and aerodynamic gliders.



Cell for PG students The first Cognitive Science Club in India is the Cognitive Science Club of NIT Trichy.



Builders' Hive's Civil & Construction Club



Graphique The NIT Trichy Official Graphic Design Club. They conceptualise, create, and curate the Festember, Pragyan, and NIT-T Orientation postings.





The NIT-T Maths and Algorithms Club strives to foster a love of mathematics among the college's engineering-focused students.



Through its events, programmes, and projects on the NIT Trichy campus and outside, the non-profit, student-run Entrepreneurship Cell aims to promote an entrepreneurial spirit and incubate ideas into enterprises.

NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, KURUKSHETRA

                                                        



The National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NITK) has a reputation for providing high-quality technical and management education, research, and training.



It has been designated as a National Institution of Great Importance.







Since its inception in 1963, NITK has made remarkable progress toward excellence. A wide lush green campus, excellent infrastructure, state-of-the-art support system, current curriculum, and dedicated faculty create an ideal atmosphere for great teaching, learning, and research.

Student Hostels-



There are nine boys' hostels and three girls' hostels at the Institute.



GIRLS HOSTEL



The Institute's girls hostel consists of two buildings: 1. Alaknanda Bhawan and 2. Bhagirathi Bhawan.

3. There are 610 seats available for B. Tech and postgraduate students at Cauvery Bhavan.



All of the hostels are well-maintained and well-equipped.



BOYS HOSTEL



There are nine boys hostels at NIT Kurukshetra. Three of the boys' hostels have triple beds, while the others have single beds.

The single-bed rooms in the Post-graduate hostel are all available.

From A to I, all of the hostels are named alphabetically. All of the names are connected to Mahabharta's characters.

In keeping with the custom, the new Mega Boys' Hostel (Hostel number. 10) is likewise titled alphabetically in the same series as 'Jagdishwar Bhawan', beginning with the letter 'J.'

Campus facilities-



Library Facility-



The library is located in a separate structure with a 3600 square metre covered space. The library effectively and efficiently meets the demands of academics, research scholars, and students with its extensive resources, space, and services.







There are 100000 books in the library, 6028 back volumes, and 3659 e-books. In the domains of science, management, and technology, the library subscribes to 158 print periodicals and roughly 2800 online articles.

The library is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to its users.



Sports Complex- 



Basketball, volleyball, lawn tennis, badminton, and racquetball courts, as well as cricket and football grounds, are all part of the complex's lush green playground.



It also contains a 400-metre sports track and a mini-gym.

Students can participate in a number of recreational activities as a result of this.













Health Centre-



The residents and students of NIT Kurukshetra have access to a health centre for their medical requirements.

A full-time resident medical practitioner works at the health centre.

For specialised care and critical cases, the health centre directs patients to empanelled doctors. The health centre has a laboratory, pharmacy, radiology, ECG service, casualty, and dental treatment.

In the event of an emergency, an ambulance service is available.







Security-



For the safety and protection of students and staff, a security force of over 130 people is on hand.

The security personnel are well-trained and come from the armed services. To protect the safety of students, staff, and property, 67 CCTV cameras have been deployed throughout the campus.



Guest Room-



National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra guest homes are developed as an added advantage for students who require additional housing and are located near the university.









Extra Curricular Activities-



Technical Societies & Technical Clubs - There are seven technical societies at the Institute, each representing a different department or group of students. Together, these societies form Team Techspardha. Besides, there are four different technical clubs.



Student Clubs - The ten different student clubs at the Institute each have a unique focus and are extremely successful in their work and interests. These clubs provide a lot of options for students to participate in cultural activities.

Student Hostels-



The Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) in Surat is a residential institute, and the Hostel component of the institute was developed to handle all aspects of student housing, food, and general well-being.

The Institute Campus currently has nine hostels, including seven boys' hostels, one girls' hostel, and one hostel guest house.



Facilities-



All of the hostels have basic amenities such as furnishings, Wi-Fi/LAN internet access, and a mess, as well as recreational amenities such as fully equipped sports facilities, music rooms, magazine rooms, and television rooms. The majority of meetings at the hostel level take place in common rooms.

Campus facilities-



Central library-



The Institute's Central Library is one of its most important facilities.



The Institute's educational, research, and innovation programmes are supported by the Library, which provides physical and digital access to intellectual content.



It has a diverse and high-quality collection of information resources in the fields of science and technology.



It contributes considerably to the Institute's academic excellence purpose by serving as a creative and innovative partner in supporting the Institute's teaching, learning, and research operations.













Canteen-



A canteen is located behind the Central Library building on campus.



It is frequented by both hostel guests and casual visitors.



On all working days, including Saturdays, the Canteen is open from 7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. There is a large range of South Indian and Chinese cuisine, as well as some fast food options.



Meals (Gujarati Thali) are supplied at relatively low prices during lunchtime.







Guest house-



The SVPB guest home (Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Bhavan) is a five-story building (ground plus four levels) with 84 rooms and eight suites.

SVPB Guest House also features two office rooms, three conference halls (one large and two small), a kitchen, and two dining halls (01 big and 01 small).









Health care-



The Health Centre is a full-fledged outpatient department (OPD) with one full-time resident doctor, six visiting medical consultants (physician, gynaecologist, paediatrician, radiologist, ayurveda & homoeopathy specialist), two pharmacists, and support staff.









Security-



The Security Supervisor and security guards make up the Security Department.

Their primary responsibility is to safeguard the Institution's assets while also ensuring law and order on campus.



Bank-



The institute has one bank and two ATM rooms on campus, one of which is a State Bank of India ATM and the other is a Canara Bank ATM.

The State Bank of India has a conventional branch on campus, which is located in front of SVNIT's main gate.





Post office-



The campus features one post office, which is located in the same building as the SBI branch, in front of the main gate of SVNIT.

General post, Registered post, Speed post, Postal savings plans, and other services are available at the post office.



Physical education-



The Outdoor Games Facilities:



Basketball  (2 Courts with flood lights)

Cricket (Optional flood lights available)

Football (Optional flood lights available)

Handball (Optional flood lights available)

Kabaddi

Kho-kho

Volleyball (2 courts with flood lights)

Lawn Tennis (2 International standard courts with class-3 lights and modern seating arrangement)

400 mt Athletic Track



The Indoor Games Complex (IGC) provides the following facilities



Badminton (2 Air conditioned International standard synthetic courts)

Chess

Caroms

Table Tennis

Ultra Modern Gym (more than 15 Single Stations, Best amongst all NITs)



Extra Curricular Activities -



Following is the list of various clubs and societies available at SVNIT Surat :-



1. SAE (society of automotive engineers) - The mission of SAE, a non-profit educational and scientific organisation, is to advance mobility technology for the benefit of all people. Over 90,000 SAE members, including engineers and scientists, create technical data on all types of self-propelled vehicles, including cars, trucks, buses, off-road vehicles, aircraft, aerospace vehicles, ships, trains, and transit systems. Through its meetings, publications, technical papers, periodicals, standards, reports, professional development programmes, and electronic databases, SAE disseminates this information.

2. DRISHTI - The NIT Surat technical-hobby club, or DRISHTI, promotes technical literacy among its members and represents the institute both domestically and abroad.



3. CHRD ( it includes various clubs like drama ,art,music,spirituality)



4. GDG (google developers group) - You can acquire new knowledge in a number of formats when you join a Google Developer Group. Additionally, local developers that share your interests in technology will be found online or in person.

5. CAM (association for computer machinery)

6. CEV (cutting edge visionaries)

7. Joyfest

8. CES (civil engineering society)

9. EES (electrical engineering society)

10. ISF (IETE STUDENTS’ FORUM )

11. Nirvana

12. Vedic science club

13. Chemical engineering society

14. SCOSH (society for cultivation of science and humanities)

National Institute Of Technology, Silchar

          



The National Institute of Technology, Silchar  was founded in 1967 as a Regional Engineering College in Assam and is one of India's 31 National Institutes of Technology.







Under the National Institutes of Technology Act of 2007, it was raised to the level of National Institute of Technology in 2002 and designated as an Institute of National Importance.

Campus facilities-



Library-



It provides one of the Institute's most essential academic services. It is a well-equipped Library that is centrally placed and simple to reach, and it stimulates the intellectual growth of students, instructors, research scholars, and others in the area.









The Library's knowledge resources are mostly in the fields of science and technology, humanities and social sciences, management, and other relevant fields.



The Library is now fully computerised, with an integrated system connected to the Campus Network, allowing the institutional community to access e-resources.



Guest house-



The Institute Guest House, which is surrounded by verdant lawns and colourful horticulture, is a lovely retreat for Institute Guests, whether they are from academia, alumni, or parents of students.



The state-of-the-art Guest House, complete with all modern amenities, is unique in the North East.











Games & Sports facilities-



The Institute features a 150m x 90m playground where students can play football, cricket, hockey, and other sports.

The institute also has a Sports Complex where students can participate in a variety of outdoor and indoor sports.

NIT Silchar also features a hard court for basketball and volleyball, as well as hard courts for badminton and volleyball.

On the campus, there is a Lawn Tennis court. Overall, the institute offers enough game and sports facilities.



Bank-



On campus, the State Bank of India operates a fully computerised full-fledged core-banking branch.

The branch's services are available to students, staff, and residents of the areas surrounding the university.





Post office-



A sub Post Office is located on the Institute's campus.

Registration, money orders, and speed mail are all available at the subpost office.

From 9.30 a.m. to 2.30 p.m., the post office is open.

Students, employees, and residents from the neighbouring communities use and benefit from the services provided by this Post Office.





Health care-



The Institute has a Health Centre with a full-time Senior Medical Officer and other competent Medical Officers to help students, employees, and their families with medical issues. 





Extra Curricular Activities -



The institute recognizes the importance of extracurricular activities in students' lives, and provides well-equipped facilities for games and sports within the hostels, in other general locations, and in the student activity centre. 







Hostels usually have many games available for guests to play. The student activity centre is used as an indoor stadium for sports and other activities.A well-maintained playing ground is used for outdoor games and other events. 



Besides these sports, students, faculty, and staff have facilities for playing tennis, basketball, and volleyball. Inter-hostel sports events are regularly held at the institute. Inter-college sports events, such as cricket, football and volleyball, are also regularly conducted in the institute.A gymnasium centre housing modern fitness equipment is in operation during the period of reporting. NITians are very active in both academic and recreational pursuits.



The students enjoy playing many different sports. Generally, competitions are held at weekends or during holidays. Regular tournaments took place during the year under review, including inter-hostel tournaments in various games.Besides participating in competitions organised on special occasions like Republic Day and Independence Day, students also participate in quizzes, debates, and technical competitions sponsored by various societies.







NITS organises annual cultural and technical festivals called Technoesis and Incandescence. These festivals allow students to improve their technical skills as well as culture.

full_content:
Dr B R AMBEDKAR NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, Jalandhar

                                                  



The Institute, as one of the National Institutes of Technology (NIT), is responsible for offering high-quality engineering, technology, and science education in order to generate competent technical and scientific people for the country. Nirf ranking of NIT Jalandhar is 52 according to 2022 rankings.





Important information regarding NIT Jalandhar-



Location-



Address- 

Grand Trunk Road, Barnala - Amritsar Bypass Rd, Jalandhar, Punjab 144011



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/PTkXadc1J4PRWuPA8







Campus size- 



The Institute's 154-acre campus is spread out over a large area. It boasts several geographical elements, as well as a variety of buildings of various types, as well as clean and broad roadways that are bordered by a green belt.









Reaching NITJ-



The institute is 15 kilometres from the Jalandhar bus terminal, on the G T Road bye pass.

Jalandhar city railway station is 12 km away, and Jalandhar Cantt railway station is 18 km away.

It is a half-kilometre walk from the Bidhipur railway crossing.

Auto rickshaw and taxi services are provided on a regular basis from both the train station and the bus stop.

Student Hostels-



There are 13 hostels in total, with ten hostels for boys and three hostels for girls.



Facilities-



Each hostel has a reading area, indoor games, and washing machines, among other amenities.













The majority of hostels have access to the internet.

All of the hostels have other amenities such as geysers, water purifiers, and water coolers.

Campus facilities-



Central library-



Dr. B. R. Ambedkar National Institute of Technology's Central Library was founded in 1988. (the same year this institute was established).















The central library is now housed in a multi-story facility in the heart of the campus, close to all departments and dormitories, and easily accessible to everybody.



The library has been separated into divisions to ensure smooth operation, and readers have unrestricted access to the library's collections.



Guest house-



Within the Institute's grounds, there is only one guest house.

The guest house is close to the shopping mall.

The Guest House includes 17 air-conditioned suites, each with a TV, Internet access, VoIP, and a blower.

The Guest House boasts a warm ambience and environment that has long been praised for its clean surroundings and delicious, hearty food.









Canteen-



There are 11 stores on the NITJ campus, including canteens (Tip-Top and Night Canteen), coffee shops (Campus Cafe), bakeries, and juice and fruit shops (Sai juice).



Night canteen-









Campus cafe-







In 3 star hotels, there is a fully equipped AC cafeteria (Snackers) with all the necessary equipment and amenities.



The snackers-













It's a complete meal that includes a variety of items (south indian , punjabi, western and Chinese).



Furthermore, the prices are reasonable, and the quality is excellent.



The nicest thing about this canteen is that it is open 24 hours a day, seven days a week.



Gymanism hall-



As a technological institute, NIT Jalandhar is expected to achieve the expected outcomes and preserve its academic reputation.

The institute, on the other hand, is always striving for greatness in athletics.

A Gymnasium is a facility for indoor sports such as badminton, table tennis, and other similar activities.







Open Air Theatre-



The Institute also features an Open Air Theatre that hosts a variety of events such as UTKANSH, Tech Fests, International Conferences, and movie screenings.







Bank and post office-



State Bank of Patiala and Canara Bank are two of the institute's banks on campus. Both banks are standard campus branches that are located in the same building.









There is a Post Office on site. The NITJ campus is a postal delivery office that is part of a separate postal zone.

The post office is open every weekday and is housed in the dispensary building.













Dispensary-



The institute site has a dispensary that provides first aid to the injured, as well as other awareness camps such as cardiac camps and BMD camps.





Dispensary is also equipped with the Pathological lab to carry out different investigations. In case of medical emergency, the ambulance van is available 24 hours for taking patient(s) to other hospitals for the required treatment.



Shopping-



There is a shopping centre on campus that caters to the needs of students and residents.

The Shopping Centre, which is close to the residential zone, provides groceries, provisions, and other necessities.

A bookshop is located in the institute's commerce area, and a Xerox machine is also available.



Student activities centre (SAC)-



The modern fully equipped Gym, Table Tennis Room, Pool Table Room, Yoga Room, Chess Room, and Ki Room are all available to guests.

The additional infrastructure would encourage health awareness, fitness, and serve as a stress reliever in today's stressful world.













Central seminar hall-



All major activities at NIT Jalandhar take place in the Central Seminar Hall.







Extra Curricular Activities -



Modern and fully equipped gymnasium, table tennis room, billiards room, yoga room, chess room and carrom room for Freshman Activities Centre (SAC) by Dr Pamita Awasthi and NIT Director Dr Lalit K Awasthi Jalandhar, August 2020 15th of May.



The added infrastructure will help increase health awareness, maintain health and eliminate stress in modern stressful lives.

NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, MEGHALAYA
The National Institute of Technology (NIT) Meghalaya is one of India's thirty-one NITs, which were established as Institutes of National Importance under the NIT Act 2007 (Amended 2012) of the Parliament of India, with full funding support from the Ministry of Education (Shiksha Mantralaya), Government of India.

full_content:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, MEGHALAYA

                                                       



The National Institute of Technology (NIT) Meghalaya is one of India's thirty-one NITs, which were established as Institutes of National Importance under the NIT Act 2007 (Amended 2012) of the Parliament of India, with full funding support from the Ministry of Education (Shiksha Mantralaya), Government of India.







The Mission:



To provide high-quality undergraduate and graduate education in the fields of engineering, science, and technology, with a focus on encouraging innovation and creativity in these fields in a clean and healthy environment.



Through excellent research initiatives, participate in the creation of knowledge and the development of technology.



Important information regarding NIT Meghalaya-



Location-



Address- 

Bijni Complex, Laitumkhrah, Shillong, Meghalaya 793003



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/HSF8mPBXV7DfEirY8





Campus size-

The magnificent NIT Meghalaya campus is stretched over 300 acres of land and is surrounded by the breathtaking views of Meghalaya's East Khasi Hills district.





Reaching NIT Meghalaya-

Guwahati is the closest railway station. To get to Shillong, take a bus or a shared taxi (Rs. 150/- to Rs. 300/- per passenger) from the railway station. Shillong is roughly a three-hour drive away.

Student Hostels-



The institute provides housing for its students; it is a fully residential institute.

There are eight boys' hostels and two girls' hostels.

Girls' hostel

Campus facilities-



Library-



The Library's knowledge resources are primarily focused on science and technology, as well as humanities, management, and other related fields.



The Library is computerised, with an integrated system connected to the Campus Network, allowing the institutional community to access koe-resources.



The Institute's network makes the full Library collection, including online databases, available.

It contains around 15,000 text and reference books in its library.



Canteen-



On campus, the Institute features two canteens: Canteen and Canteen/Cafeteria.

The first is next to the Community Hall and beside the Institute UPS system, while the second is just next to the entrance gate.

Both canteens provide breakfast and lunch, while Canteen also offers a variety of snacks and soft drinks.









Medical/Hospital- 



Three times a week, NIT Meghalaya has arranged for a doctor to visit the campus. The institute has a contract with a well-known state hospital to serve students, employees, and faculty members.



Wifi-



Wi-Fi is available to students and staff at the university.



Sports facilities-



Indoor: Chess Board, Carrom Board, and Table Tennis

Outdoor: Football, Volleyball, and Cricket



Extra Curricular Activities -



NIT Meghalaya has a variety of extra-curricular activities in its campus. It has various cells and clubs which consists of:



Photography Club

Literary Club

Music Club

Dance & Drama Club

Robotics Club

Coding Club







Along with the clubs, it has many outreach activities like National Service Scheme (NSS),  NIT Awareness Drive,  Rastriya Avishkar Aviyan, Unnat Bharat Abhiyan, Rural Technology Action Group (RuTAG), etc. where students can participate.

overview:
MAULANA AZAD NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, BHOPAL
Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT or NIT Bhopal, NIT-B) is a public technical university located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India.
It is one of India's National Institutes of Technology, a collection of nationally financed institutions.
It is named after Abul Kalam Azad, India's first Minister of Education, scholar, and freedom activist, who is better known as Maulana Azad.

full_content:
MAULANA AZAD NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, BHOPAL



                                                         

   



Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT or NIT Bhopal, NIT-B) is a public technical university located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India. 



It is one of India's National Institutes of Technology, a collection of nationally financed institutions. 





It is named after Abul Kalam Azad, India's first Minister of Education, scholar, and freedom activist, who is better known as Maulana Azad.

Campus size-

The enthralling all-encompassing campus is 650 acres in size and is surrounded by a boundary wall and a ring road.





Reaching MANIT Bhopal-

Bhopal Junction is the closest railway station near the MANIT Bhopal campus. The campus is 2.22 kilometres away.

NSC

Auditorium-



Dr. S. Radhakrishnan Auditorium has been restored from the former Students Activity Centre (SAC).

It can hold up to 800 people and is equipped with a great Hi-Tech sound system.









It is fully air-conditioned and has hosted performances by a variety of well-known artists from both on and off campus..

The Institute offers medical services to its students and employees.

NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, RAIPUR

                                                      



The National Institute of Technology, Raipur (NIT Raipur or NITRR) is an Indian public technical and research university. In 1956, the company was established.







The institute is dedicated to the difficult work of developing technical education by preparing experienced graduates in highly advanced engineering and technology sectors.

Student Hostels-



The campus of the institute is entirely residential. The campus has a total of 8 hostels, including 5 for boys and 3 for girls.











Boys Hostel-



A dining hall as well as a leisure area with TV, table tennis, and carrom are available in Hostels A, B, C, D, and F.

The dining area and leisure hall of Hostel H are both well-equipped ( likely to be equipped with indoor games and other facilities for recreation ).

The hostels are all well-equipped with the necessities.



Girls hostel-



There are three girls hostels at NIT Raipur: E, G, and P.G.

T.V., sports equipment, water coolers, and well-equipped mess facilities are available at these hostels.

Every hostel operates as a cooperative mess. A group of student representatives manages the hostels.



Hostel facilities-

24 hours water supply and electricity

Common room

Separate mess

24 hours security

Wi-Fi connectivity



Campus facilities-



Central library-



The NIT Raipur Central Library contains a large collection of about 1 lakh materials, including text books, reference books, and back volume publications.

It also has access to a wide range of print journals and online resources.







Medical facilities-



The Nit Dispensary Raipur is located next to the NCC office and has three rooms: two for the doctors and one for the Dispensary's staff.



Medical Facility Available :-

Free OPD Consultation to all the staff & students of NIT Raipur

Free Distribution of Medicines to all the staffs & students of NIT Raipur

Free Ambulance Service for hospitalisation to staff & students of NIT Raipur



Guest house-



The institute's Guest House accommodates institute guests, guests of institute faculty/staff members, parents of students, visitors from other NITs and educational institutes, participants in institute-sponsored activities, and those who have received authorisation from competent authorities.









There are three living rooms, one dining hall, and one hall in the guest home. All of the rooms have modern amenities such as air conditioning, television, and refrigerator.



Sports-



Outdoor sports such as Athletics, Cricket, Football, Hockey, Badminton, Basketball, Baseball, Lawn Tennis, Swimming, Gymnastics, Yoga Exercises, and Volleyball are all available through the Sports Department.

full_content:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, SRINAGAR

                                                 



Srinagar's National Institute of Technology is one of the country's most prestigious educational institutions.

It was founded in 1960 and was one of the eighteen Regional Engineering Colleges supported by the Indian government during the Second Plan.



In August 2003, the Institute was designated as a National Institute of Technology with deemed-university status, and thus gained complete academic autonomy.



Important information regarding NIT Srinagar-



Location-



Address- 

Hazratbal, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir 190006



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/4J3R2SfWfonnsQ9J6



Campus size-

NIT Srinagar institute is spread over 67 acres.





Reaching MNIT Allahabad-

Nowgam, about 18 kilometres from the Institute campus, is the nearest railway station.

Campus facilities-



Library-



The library contains a variety of books, editions, periodicals, newspapers, volumes, dictionaries, and study materials that can be utilised by students at the National Institute of Technology, Srinagar, who are enrolled in a variety of programmes.



The National Institute of Technology, Srinagar's whole library is computerised, and every book in the library may be found at the NIT Srinagar's e-library.



Medical facilities-



The students of NIT Srinagar have access to medical services such as a dispensary and an ambulance.

Students are also transported to nearby hospitals in the event of an emergency. Medical and paramedical staff, as well as an ambulance service, are available 24 hours a day, seven days a week.





Sports facilities-



On the campus of the National Institute of Technology, Srinagar, all of the essential equipment for both indoor and outdoor sports is provided.







Canteen-



NIT Srinagar students and faculty members have access to a café that serves delicious and healthy cuisine and beverages.

All of the food in the cafeteria is prepared with hygiene and cleanliness in mind.







Gym-



The National Institute of Technology, Srinagar, is building a gymnasium to meet the students' physical fitness needs.

The gymnasium also hosts yoga sessions.

The gymnasium is well-equipped with all of the current amenities and equipment that students will need to complete their fitness routine.





Extra Curricular Activities -



The IIED (INNOVATION, INCUBATION AND ENTREPRENEURSHIP DEVELOPMENT) CENTRE in Nit Srinagar is the finest place to join if you want to develop your entrepreneurial abilities and bring your innovation (if it's excellent) to society in some form. Before this centre, there was no appropriate forum for discussing inventions. However, if you had an idea that was helpful, they would gladly support you in taking it to the next level.



In this institute, there are numerous clubs as well which are listed below:



Code Club:- To create good coders for today's computerised society and new software, websites, and other developments, this initiative was just started by students at this university.







Dance Cub:- lOne of the top clubs in Nit Srinagar for dancing instruction and skill development.They become more self-assured and lose their stage fright.  It's best to unwind on the weekend after a busy week of classes.



Music Club:-  The word "music" has a long history dating back to ancient times, and this club supports the continued development of music artists.



Sports Club:-  This club has no leadership, which results making it a good one for honing your sporting abilities.



Poetry Club:-  This is one of the best clubs where you may showcase your poetic abilities and, if your poetry is really amazing, it can even make you famous.







There are many other clubs, these clubs have a better following than others. These clubs show that NIT Srinagar students are talented not only in academics but also in extracurricular pursuits.

overview:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, PATNA
MHRD, Government of India, has designated National Institute of Technology Patna as an Institute of National Importance and has granted it full autonomy..
The Institute has also been designated as a Centre of Excellence for providing high-quality teaching, research, and development in the fields of science, engineering, and technology, as well as the humanities.
The National Institute of Technology Patna strives to set high educational standards and has a long history of academic distinction.

full_content:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, PATNA

                                                 



MHRD, Government of India, has designated National Institute of Technology Patna as an Institute of National Importance and has granted it full autonomy.. 



The Institute has also been designated as a Centre of Excellence for providing high-quality teaching, research, and development in the fields of science, engineering, and technology, as well as the humanities.



The National Institute of Technology Patna strives to set high educational standards and has a long history of academic distinction.



Important information regarding NIT Patna-



Location-



Address- 

J5CC+8Q9, Patna University Campus, Patna, Bihar 800005



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/WUEnjqRAVQVNQ1US9







Campus size-

NIT Patna is housed on a 40-acre (16-hectare) campus along Ashok Rajpath, which is located on the southern bank of the Ganges, directly across from its confluence with the Gandak.



Reaching NIT Patna-

The Institute campus is located 8 kilometres from Patna Junction Railway Station and 20 kilometres from Patna's Jai Prakash Narayan International Airport.

Student Hostels-



Students have access to residential amenities.

The campus has a total of 5 hostels, with 3 hostels for boys and 2 hostels for girls.



Breakfast, lunch, and dinner are served at a common mess at each hostel. There is also a constant supply of water and electricity.



Hostels provide separate wifi connections to provide students with internet access 24 hours a day, seven days a week.



In the common rooms, newspapers and magazines are displayed.



Cleanliness and hygiene are observed and maintained at all times.





Campus facilities-



Central library-



The institute's Central Library has a large collection of over 75,000 books to meet the demands of all engineering areas.



It features a vast library of over 10,000 computer-related books, as well as sections for each engineering discipline and architecture.









In addition to engineering-related publications, the central library has a diverse collection of other business and current-affairs magazines, pamphlets, and journals, including TIME and NEWSWEEK.



Medical facilities-



Students at the institute have access to medical care. For their checkup, they have two permanent doctors.



In the event of an emergency, the institute also maintains a 24-hour ambulance that is used to transport patients from the institute to Patna Medical College and Hospital (PMCH).



Sports facilities-



A healthy body is accompanied by a healthy mind.

The institute encourages students to participate in sports on a regular basis.

The following are some of the services provided by the institute:-





SAC-



The Student Activity Centre (SAC) was designed with the goal of supporting a variety of student activities.



The SAC hosts a variety of cultural activities and indoor games.. 



This massive structure contains multiple rooms, each of which is dedicated to sports and extracurricular activities.







Banking-



Within the institute's grounds, there is a fully functional Allahabad Bank extension branch.



It has all of the current banking amenities to meet the demands of the students and employees on campus.

The fee transactions take place here as well.

In addition, an Allahabad Bank ATM is located near the college's main gate, allowing for convenient money withdrawal at any time.



Extra Curricular Activities-



NIT Patna students demonstrate exemplary qualities with great aplomb in terms of student activities and sports.They have six different cultural clubs (such as Music Club, Drama Club, Dance Club, Chess Club, Literature and Art Club, Yoga and Meditation Club) and eleven different technical clubs (such as Photography, Electronics, Web and Coding, SPICMACAY, ASME, Robotics, SAE, ISAI, NavyaKalam, IEEE and E-cell).

hostel_info:
Outstation students can stay in NIT Goa's hostels, which are shared rooms on campus or in a rented structure close to the university.

Currently, existing hostels are equipped with basic amenities such as a mess and Wi-Fi internet access.

There are three hostels in all, with three hostels for boys and one hostel for girls.
campus_facilities:
Library:
The National Institute of Technology Goa library is a living creature with three distinct characteristics: document, user, and services. Its main goal is to assist academics in the development of knowledge through educational activities, such as teaching and research.

Sports:
Football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, carom, throwball, chess, and athletics are some of the most popular sports played at the institute.

The Institute has won medals in athletics and has represented India in several games at the All India Inter NIT Tournament.

Cultural events for students are also a big draw, and our students recently took first place in a national level drama competition at the All India Inter NIT Cultural events.

Students' talent and abilities are excellent, and they will continue to be such in the future.

In NIT Goa, the support of teaching faculty and other personnel for sports and cultural events is particularly noteworthy.
overview:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, GOA
The National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa) is one of the region's most prestigious technical institutes. NIT Goa is a 'National Institute of National Importance' that was created in 2010 by an act of parliament (NIT act 2007).
NIT Goa is a self-contained institute that operates under the Ministry of Education (MoE) of the Indian government.

Campus facilities-



Library- 



The National Institute of Technology Goa library is a living creature with three distinct characteristics: document, user, and services. Its main goal is to assist academics in the development of knowledge through educational activities, such as teaching and research.







Classroom-



The institute operates from its own site, which includes adequate classrooms and laboratories.

All of the classrooms have been updated with a projector and other necessary technology equipment.





Sports and games-



Football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, carom, throwball, chess, and athletics are some of the most popular sports played at the institute.

The Institute has won medals in athletics and has represented India in several games at the All India Inter NIT Tournament.

Cultural events for students are also a big draw, and our students recently took first place in a national level drama competition at the All India Inter NIT Cultural events.

Students' talent and abilities are excellent, and they will continue to be such in the future.

In NIT Goa, the support of teaching faculty and other personnel for sports and cultural events is particularly noteworthy.



Bank-



The institution has an ATM on campus that provides basic banking services.



Medical Facilities-



Students can contact the medical specialists at NIT Goa in the event of a medical emergency.



Wifi-



The NIT Goa campus, as well as the dorms, are fully equipped with wi-fi, and students are free to use it whenever they want.



Extra Curricular Activities-



Various extracurricular activities are available at NIT Goa. It includes variety of clubs under Students Activity Centre (SAC) which are listed below:



(1) Adventure Club

(2) Anti-ragging Club

(3) Campus Club

(4) Citizen Club

(5) Career Development Club

full_content:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, KARNATAKA

                     

  

The National Institute of Technology Karnataka (NITK) was founded in 1960 as the Karnataka Regional Engineering College (KREC) and upgraded to the National Institute of Technology Karnataka (NITK) in 2002.







Vision- To assist students in becoming decent human beings, responsible citizens, and competent professionals by focusing on information assimilation, generation, and distribution.



Mission- 

To provide high-quality education in order to meet the needs of the profession and society, as well as to achieve excellence in teaching, learning, and research.

Attract and develop skilled and dedicated employees, and foster an environment that encourages innovation, creativity, teamwork, and entrepreneurial leadership.



Important information regarding NIT Karnataka-



Location-



Address-

NH 66, Srinivasnagar, Surathkal, Mangaluru, Karnataka 575025



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/dFM4135vrDM5Dh7K7





Campus size- 

On both sides of National Highway No. 66, NITK features a lush green 295.35-acre campus.









Reaching NIT Karnataka-

The nearest railway station to NIT Karnataka is (MAQ)MANGALORE CNTL, which is 17.54 kilometres away.

Student Hostels-



The Institute is a fully residential campus with a hostel that can accommodate over 5000 students, with separate blocks for ladies.

For students, there are a total of 1 hostel.















Hostel facilities-

24 hours water supply and electricity

Common room

Separate mess

24 hours security

Wi-Fi connectivity



Campus facilities-



Central Library-



The Institute is a fully residential campus with a hostel that can accommodate over 5000 students, with separate blocks for ladies.

For students, there are a total of 1 hostel.





The campus contains a state-of-the-art central library with about 135,000 printed books, 8193 electronic books, 12,045 electronic journals, 260 printed journals, 23 two-databases, 15400 back volumes, and two bibliographic and scientific databases.





Mess & canteens-



Independent messes of various varieties are run at several hostels to cater to the tastes of students from various regions.

Furthermore, two-night canteens are operating on both the boys' and girls' campuses to cater to late-night hunger.

Furthermore, five well-established cafeterias are located throughout the campus to provide excellent and clean food to hungry students.











Guest House-



The institute features four guest houses: J C Bose Guest House, Homi J Bhaba Guest House, Vikram Sarabhai Guest House, and one International Hostel, all of which have state-of-the-art facilities and provide lodging for Institute guests, personnel, and student guardians.





Sports facilities-



Students have access to sporting facilities on campus, which include the following:



Outdoor Activities-



International Standard Swimming Pool  with the h diving arena.

Football, volleyball, handball, hockey, kho-kho, Kabaddi, and cricket fields are well maintained. (1 for each)





Basketball Courts (with floodlights) encircled by a pavilion.

Tennis Court on the Lawn (4)



Indoor Sports-



Modern Gymnasium (1) (Boys’ and Girls’ Separate)

Well-equipped Badminton Court (4) (Wooden and Cement)



Table Tennis playing arena with International Standard Tables. (5)







Open Air Theatre (Students Activity Centre)-



There is one open-air theatre with a seating capacity of roughly 1000 people.



Bank and post office-



Inside the premises, there is a State Bank of India and a Canara Bank, both of which have ATMs.

Aside from that, an independent branch of the Post Office is located on the site, making communication between employees and students more convenient.



Beach-



NITK owns a private beach on the Arabian Sea's coastline, complete with lighthouses.

Students and staff have had a lot of fun here and enjoy the beauty of Sunset every day.









Health care centre-



The Health Care Centre, which includes a well-equipped 24x7 ambulance station on campus, provides medical services to workers and students.







Shopping complex-



A shopping complex with two cooperative society branches equipped with all daily requirements, air-conditioning, a gent's parlour, a printing and DTP centre, a confectionery shop, and other amenities provides vital commodities shopping for students and personnel on campus.



Extracurricular activity-



Local student branches of significant national and international technical societies have been established at NITK. The Institution of Engineers, the Computer Society of India, the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE), and the Robotics Club NITK are a few of them.



Society of Automotive Engineers (SAE)- 

Students studying mechanical engineering make up an active chapter of the Society of Automotive Engineers (SAE). Events including "How Stuff Works," "Under the Hood," "Can You Fix It?" and a Vintage Auto Expo are held there. A racing team from NITK competes in SAE BAJA. The hardest circuit on the FSAE schedule, Michigan USA 2011, was attended by its sibling team NITKRacing in 2011. It was the sole Indian team that took part in the competition.



Literary, Stage and Debating Society (LSD)- 



The institute's premier literary forum is the Literary, Stage and Debating Society (LSD). The club primarily hosts quizzes, but it also hosts debates and puts on plays. In order to support literary activities other than quizzes, LSD was established in 2004 from the quiz club. One of the top quiz clubs in India, LSD has produced quizzers who have excelled in regional and national contests. The NITK Quiz blog, which has been running since 2008, also features contributions from club members. 



Dance Dramatics and Fashion Club (DDFC)- 

The yearly "Spandan" event is put on by the Dance Dramatics and Fashion Club (DDFC), giving students a chance to show off their dance and acting skills. The NITK Songs Club hosts musical performances at outdoor auditoriums that are typically referred to as Musical Nights and feature popular music. Various fashions are on display.





Others are- Kannada Rajyotsava.

Odd Sem Rotaract Club.

Campus Cleanup Drive Rotaract Club.

Web Enthusia-st's Club Hindi Evam Sanskrit Club 

Entrepreneurship Cell (E-Cell) Club.

The Institution of Engineers Club

NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, JAMSHEDPUR

                                        



The National Institute of Technology, Jamshedpur, was founded on August 15, 1960, as a joint venture of the Government of India and the Government of Bihar in the chain of RECs (Regional Engineering Colleges) in India with the goal of producing technical graduates of the highest standards who could provide technological leadership to the region.

Reaching NIT Jamshedpur-

types of services: Students, teachers, researchers, and other members of the staff are all welcome.

reprinting services

Guest house-



Outsiders or visitors to the college can stay at the campus's guest house.





Bank-



Within its premises, the Institute has ATMs from State Bank of India and ICICI Bank, as well as the State Bank of India's RIT (Regional Institute of Technology) Branch with specific counters for NIT, Jamshedpur staff and students



Post office-



Staff and students can use the RIT (Regional Institute of Technology) Post Office, which is located on campus, for all types of postal services.





Medical facility-



Employees, their dependents, and students can receive care for basic day-to-day health concerns (small diseases) as well as drugs from the institute.

Ambulance service is accessible 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for both workers and students in case of an emergency.







Sports-



On campus, there is an athletic field and a cricket field.

Apart from that, each hostel is equipped with sporting equipment such as table tennis, lawn tennis, cricket, football, badminton, carom, chess, and so on.







Extra Curricular Activities- 

 

Culfest is the college's yearly cultural celebration. Participants from colleges across India compete in this national event that is organised. The highlight of Culfest is "Shades," which is put on by the FACES club members from the college. A theme is used to decorate the entire room in this instance with garbage. Competitions in dance, singing, visual arts, group discussion(GD), JAM, Antakshari, and a fashion show are all part of the cultural festival. Jukebox, paper dance, street play, X-games, rock concert, and hasya kavi sammelan are additional attractions.

full_content:
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, AGARTALA

                                                        



The National Institute of Technology Agartala (NIT Agartala or NITA) is a technology-oriented higher education institute in Agartala, India, founded by India's Ministry of Human Resource Development.



The Institute is dedicated to the development of highly qualified young engineers, scientists, and management professionals to meet the ever-increasing techno-managerial needs of national and worldwide standards while adhering to professional ethics and societal commitment.



Important information regarding NIT Agartala-

Reaching NIT Agartala-

Student Hostels-



The campus provides housing for its students.

Both a Boys' and a Girls' hostel are available at the Institute.

There are six Boys' hostels and two Girls' hostels at the moment. In the coming years, new hostels will be offered on campus, which is currently undergoing master planning.











Campus facilities-



Library-



The NIT Agartala central library has about a 1 lakh volume collection of books and journals, with 8 to 8 periodic lending service, well-equipped reading rooms, and access to back volume indexes and references in the stock rooms area.





The library's stockroom alone includes 34000 books and 200 journals, and the library also offers copying and scanning services 



Banking and post office-



The State Bank of India operates a branch on the Institute site with an ATM.





"NIT Agartala", PIN - 799046, is the name of the campus's Post Office.









Health care-



A well-equipped Medical Unit on campus, staffed by two senior Medical Officers, pharmacists, and other support staff, is ready to provide medical care to students, staff, and other visitors. 





Patients can be sent to the Jirania Rural Hospital (Primary Health Centre) 4 km distant or to the state hospital in Agartala in the event of an emergency.



Wi-Fi -



The Wi-Fi access at NIT Agartala is widely available throughout the campus, meeting the internet connectivity and service demands of students and staff.



Extra Curricular Activities-



NITA gives the students a lot of opportunities for extracurricular activities in the form of clubs, competitions etc. You can become a member of any of the clubs there to take part in more and more cultural activities. Some of the clubs are:



College Magazine

GNU Linux Users Group

Robotics Club

Art Club

Photography Club 



‘We Can’ is an initiative taken by the students of NIT-A where they teach underprivileged kids for free. They also have a FB page and YouTube channel known as ANARC, where the robotics club regularly conducts sessions. 



Members of this club perform in the techno-cultural fest of NIT AGARTALA called ‘ADVAITAM’, where students can participate. 





Before the end of the 2nd semester, the club organises an exam to test its members, the member who passes the exam becomes an official member of the robotics club, and they will receive different positions next year. In the summertime, you may be asked to create your own project.

hostel_info:
Both a Boys' and a Girls' hostel are available at the institute.

There are two Boys' hostels and one Girls' hostel at the moment.

However, there are only a limited number of seats available. More hostels will be accessible on campus in the following year, for which a master plan has already been established.

The building of hostels for both boys and girls has begun.

Students who want to stay in a hostel must fill out an admissions form.
campus_facilities:
Library:
Textbooks, reference books, back volumes, standards, and non-book material such as CD-ROMs are among the 10,000 volumes in the central library.

The institute library comprises a lending area, a reading room, a reference section, a stock room with over 10,000 books, e-journals, and e-books, as well as a digital system.

Medical Facilities	

A well-equipped Medical Unit with sufficient Medical Officers and Support Staff is provided on campus to provide medical care to students, staff, and other inmates. In the event of an emergency, the patient is transferred to the Regional Institute of Medical Science (RIMS) in Imphal or the JNIMS in Imphal, all of which are close to the campus.

Sports:
Students at NIT Manipur have access to both indoor and outdoor sports facilities.

The institute also supplies all of the necessary equipment for playing at various locations, both indoor and outdoor.

NIT Manipur's sports club also helps students to improve their athletic performance.

Student Hostels-



Both a Boys' and a Girls' hostel are available at the institute.

There are two Boys' hostels and one Girls' hostel at the moment.

However, there are only a limited number of seats available. More hostels will be accessible on campus in the following year, for which a master plan has already been established.

The building of hostels for both boys and girls has begun.

Students who want to stay in a hostel must fill out an admissions form.

Central library-



Textbooks, reference books, back volumes, standards, and non-book material such as CD-ROMs are among the 10,000 volumes in the central library.



The institute library comprises a lending area, a reading room, a reference section, a stock room with over 10,000 books, e-journals, and e-books, as well as a digital system.









Medical Facilities	



A well-equipped Medical Unit with sufficient Medical Officers and Support Staff is provided on campus to provide medical care to students, staff, and other inmates. In the event of an emergency, the patient is transferred to the Regional Institute of Medical Science (RIMS) in Imphal or the JNIMS in Imphal, all of which are close to the campus.

..

Classrooms-



Every class has well-organised and furnished classrooms, as well as digital boards, to ensure that students have a better learning experience.





Sports-



Students at NIT Manipur have access to both indoor and outdoor sports facilities.

The institute also supplies all of the necessary equipment for playing at various locations, both indoor and outdoor.

NIT Manipur's sports club also helps students to improve their athletic performance.

NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, PUDUCHERRY

                                        



The National Institute of Technology Puducherry (NITPY) is a public technical and research university in Puducherry, India.



It is one of India's 31 National Institutes of Technology, and the Government of India has designated it as an Institute of National Importance[3] under the National Institutes of Technology, Science Education and Research Act, 2007.

NIT Puducherry has a campus that spans 258 acres in the Karaikal suburbs of Poovam and Thiruvettakudy.



Reaching NIT Puducherry-

The nearest station is Karaikal Railway Station, which is around 11 kilometres from the NITPY.
