hostel_info:
Poornima University (PU) recognizes that a major concern of all the parents and their wards is the availability and quality of accommodation. 

Poornima provides separate hostels for girls and boys within the campus. 

Poornima University has Two Boys Hostel named Himalaya Boys Hostel (HBH-HBH-II) (named after the highest mountain peak of the world), One Girls Hostel named Gargi Girls Hostel (named after goddess of knowledge – Maa Saraswati).
campus_facilities:
Library:
The library at Poornima University serves as its lifeline. 
It is a primary educational resource for both students and faculty. 

The library at PU campus holds a voluminous collection of publications in various subjects, such as engineering, management, architecture, commerce, computer science, humanities, general interest and more.

Sports:
Sports bring joy and also help in building team work and empathy among students. 
The university has its own sports team, Poornima Panthers, which represents PU in cricket, soccer, volleyball, basketball, chess, badminton, athletics, literary events, dance and many more. 
The campus also has a gymnasium equipped with treadmills and multi-gym apparatus.
overview:
POORNIMA UNIVERSITY, JAIPUR

The university was established by Rajasthan State Legislature vide Act No. 16/2012 and is recognized under section 22(1) of University Grants Commission (India) Act, 1956.

full_content:
POORNIMA UNIVERSITY, JAIPUR

                                   

Poornima University, established in 2012, is a private university in Jaipur, Rajasthan. 





The university was established by Rajasthan State Legislature vide Act No. 16/2012 and is recognized under section 22(1) of University Grants Commission (India) Act, 1956.





Important information regarding Purnima University-



Location-



Address-

Plot No. IS-2027-2031, Ramchandrapura P.O. Vidhani Vatika Road Sitapura, Rajasthan 303905



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/NSsuCA7g6NmxE2dH6



Campus size-32 acres





Reaching Purnima University-

There are three stops close to Poornima University: one Durgapura, about 15 kms from PU, another at GandhiNagar railway station, Third is main railway station is about 23 kms from MNIT, one can take bus, prepaid taxi, Ola/Uber/Taxi for You carbs or an Auto to reach PU campus.

Student Hostels-



Poornima University (PU) recognizes that a major concern of all the parents and their wards is the availability and quality of accommodation. 

Poornima provides separate hostels for girls and boys within the campus. 













Poornima University has Two Boys Hostel named Himalaya Boys Hostel (HBH-HBH-II) (named after the highest mountain peak of the world), One Girls Hostel named Gargi Girls Hostel (named after goddess of knowledge – Maa Saraswati).



Campus facilities-



Library- 



The library at Poornima University serves as its lifeline. 

It is a primary educational resource for both students and faculty. 



The library at PU campus holds a voluminous collection of publications in various subjects, such as engineering, management, architecture, commerce, computer science, humanities, general interest and more.



Sports facility-



Sports bring joy and also help in building team work and empathy among students. 

The university has its own sports team, Poornima Panthers, which represents PU in cricket, soccer, volleyball, basketball, chess, badminton, athletics, literary events, dance and many more. 

The campus also has a gymnasium equipped with treadmills and multi-gym apparatus.







Cafeterias-



Inside the sprawling campus of Poornima University there are 7 cafeterias that function well to serve the students and staff members with a variety of food items like fresh fruit juices, vegetarian/non vegetarian snacks, ice creams, etc at subsidised rates till late hours.









Gymnasium-



The campus haAt separate fitness centres for the hostel boys and girls. 

The student’s fitness centres are at the University campus which has treadmills, stretching machines, suspension trainers, stationary bikes, abdominal benches, cross trainers and weight training equipment.

 There are certified Weight & Fitness Trainers as well. 





Banking and ATMs- 



The University has tied up with leading Nationalised Bank; HDFCto assist in channelizing Education Loans to the willing students. Students are free to avail of this facility.







ATM: Within the Poornima University campus there is a fully operational 24 hours ATM ofCanara Bank. 



Extracurricular activity-



Green club-

Each school will have an Eco-Green Club made up of educators and a group of enthusiastic kids who want to learn about the environment and take action to improve their immediate surroundings. They will also offer a fantastic chance to raise consciousness, cultivate attitudes, and empower pupils to engage in real-world activities.





Electric Infinity club-

raising social awareness among the locals and students of the ECE department in order to provide a stage for the students so they may display their literary and cultural potential and enhance their personality and managerial abilities.



GDSC-

Poornima is a community organisation led by Google and students called Google Developer Student Clubs (GDSC). Students can increase their knowledge in a peer-to-peer learning environment and develop solutions for nearby businesses and their community by joining a GDSC.

overview:
GOVERNMENT ENGINEERING COLLEGE, AJMER
Established in the year 1997, Engineering College Ajmer, generally referred to as ECA is an autonomous institute of the Government of Rajasthan.
Mission-
To nurture value oriented competent professionals through conceptual, analytical and technical knowledge for overall sustainable societal development.
To achieve academic excellence in engineering, technology and science by imparting quality based education.
To strengthen managerial and entrepreneurial skills to start new ventures.
To inculcate inquisitive and research oriented approach.

Student Hostels-



Unfortunately no hostel is available in college. But a large amount of cost effective hostels and PGS are available outside the college.

Central library-



The college is the college library, which holds a huge collection of books on every subject.





Guest house-



Engineering College Ajmer has one Guest House with 2 AC room facilities for guests.



Sports-



A few metres away is the sports room, the college has a variety of indoor sports the students can play. 

The college has the following sports facilities: Crick, Volleyball, Kabad, Kho-Kho,  Basketball,  Badminton, Athletics, etc.









Bank/ATM-



The State Bank of India is located inside the Campus. 

It is situated on the ground floor of the Institute New building area.





Transportation-



The college has a transport facility for students and staff.



Extracurricular activity-



Almost all sports are played here, and contests are held yearly. Every week, there are also extracurricular activities, but you have to be especially careful to find out about them before they happen so you don't even know until your senior year. There is a web page for a club that is run by students. 



There are numerous social clubs in colleges, including ones for singing, dancing, sports, and the arts. 



There are additional clubs for students interested in artificial intelligence and machine learning. Additionally, as these groups are run solely by students, you are free to start your own at any moment.



  





Placement-



 Around 30-40% of students got placed last year. Most of the students got a package of 4-5 LPA. In civil engineering, only 1% of students got placed from our college. 

The highest package is around 6-7 LPA.

LNM INSTITUTE OF INFORMATION AND TECHNOLOGY

                                          



The LNM Institute of Information Technology (LNMIIT), is an institute of higher learning that is Deemed University & located in Jaipur, India.



To establish centres of excellence in emerging areas to provide significant breakthroughs required to solve real world problems.

To make The LNMIIT as the most preferred institute for higher education across the country.

To create intellectual property through innovations, quality research publications and patents.



Important information regarding LNMIIT-



Location-



Address-

Rupa ki Nangal, Post-Sumel, Via, Jamdoli, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302031

https://maps.app.goo.gl/hjgbJi43X89W7TF69







Campus size- 100 acres





Reaching LNMIIT-

Approximate distance to LNMIIT from: Railway Station is 17.5 km, Airport is 23.2 km & Bus Stand is 16.4 km

Student Hostels-



Hostels at LNMIIT are very good. There are 4 Boy's Hostels and 1 Girls Hostel.







They are spacious with an inbuilt badminton court for enjoyment. 

Each hostel has a vending machine for late-night foodies. 

Each room has two beds, two cupboards and two desks, and a chair. 

Each room has an AC duct for cooling in summers. 

Bathrooms are very clean with facilities of both hot and cold water both. Messes are very good and hygienic . 

They have a very good menu which changes periodically. 

Hostels are alloted at the time of counselling on a lottery basis.

 Either you get 1 seater or 2 seaters. For each consecutive year, hostels are changed like first-year shifted to BH2, second year to BH3 like this , this too on a lottery basis.









Campus facilities-



Library-



LNM Institute of Information Technology Jaipur facilities include a library. 

The library has many books, journals, and e-resources. 

The library helps the students by making sure to provide them with the required academic resources.







Sports-



LNMIIT Jaipur provides a large number of sports facilities to the students. 

This includes the football ground, volleyball court, basketball court, badminton court, etc.











Medical/Hospital-



This institute also provides medical facilities to their students. 

Facilities are available 24 hours.

It has a resident doctor, ambulance service and a tie-up with a nearby hospital.





Wifi-



LNMIIT Jaipur facilities include high-speed internet facilities.



Gym-



Students managed the gym of the campus by themselves.

Gym has all the morden types of equipment.





Auditorium-



The college auditorium is used by the students and faculty to conduct various activities and functions.



Extra Curricular Activities-



We host and take part in a huge variety of events, including the Literary Society, Astronomy, Dramatics, Music, Dance, Nukkad, Animation, Robotics, recording studio, and even a photographic club!



In India, the trademarks of our cultural, technical, and sporting festivals are already well-known. The Sporting Complex features practically all of the sports facilities, including Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, a Basketball court, and a gym. An institution like LNMIIT is particularly notable for its drive for excellence.



Science and Tech Council







The goal of the Science and Technology Council is to encourage students' technical thinking. Over the years, the council has fostered a wide variety of clubs that address many facets of the institute's technological environment. These institutes have established their worth over time by taking home awards for their institutions in a variety of competitions. The following clubs help the council carry out its activities. The General Secretary of Science and Technology is in charge of the council. Plinth, LNMIIT's yearly festival of technology, literature, and management, is also under the control of the council.



There are 8 clubs in the council.



1. Astronomy Club

2. Cybros

3. E-cell

4. Innovation and incubation club

5. Literary Committee

6. LNMIIT MUN Society

7. Phoenix Club

8. Quiz club



Cultural Council







All non-technical clubs in the college that support the unique abilities of the student body are overseen by the cultural council. The cultural council's wide variety of groups offers the student body a venue to display their originality in non-technical subjects. The general secretary of the cultural council, club coordinators, senators, and members of the general body serve as its leaders. The annual cultural festival of LNMIIT, Vivacity, one of the biggest cultural festivals in the nation, is also organised by the cultural council.



There are 10 clubs in the council.



1. Art club

2. Dance club

3. Drama club

4. Fashion club

5. Fundoo club

6. Nukkad club

7. Photography club

8. Sankalp club

9. Media Cell

10. Music club

Campus facilities-



Library-



Manipal University Jaipur University's library is constantly being updated (both in print and online) with large collections of books and other resources.

With forty-five personal computers, the University has also advanced its digital library.













A library's collection of net lectures, periodicals, and e-content is extensive.

The E-Granthalaya software programme bundle, which is an integrated multi-consumer library control system, follows the MUJ library.



Guest house-

house facility for guests and parents with restaurants. With specialised indoor and outdoor courts of numerous video games such as Basketball, Badminton, Lawn Tennis, and others.











Throughout the year, several sports are performed in order to interact with all of the college students.



Hospital-



A resident doctor can be found on the premises of the hostel.

If a student requires medical attention, he or she must notify the Caretaker/Matron/Warden right away.

Inside the school, an ambulance is also available.



Extra Curricular Activities-







One of the most well-known organisations in India, as well as in Manipal University, is IAESTE India-MIT. It is a group for international students with committees in many different nations. Basically, its purpose is to provide students with technical employment experiences abroad. For obvious reasons, people think that if you have completed an internship via IAESTE, your prospects of being placed will be enhanced.



Another worldwide organisation for technical students, IEEE, has a chapter in Manipal. If you enjoy technical aspects, this is the one for you. More brilliance from the good committee members.



IT and computer science students only may use IE-CSE. They oversee the majority of college-related online activities. Then there are more IEs like IE-ECE, IE-Civils, IE-Aero, and others. The best club of them all is IE-CSE.



DRAMANON is for you if acting and drama are your strong suits. This group casts fantastic actors in its outstanding productions. The feeling you get from seeing their performance is priceless.



You can work for Space & Satellite by applying to PARIKSHIT. A nano-satellite is currently being created and will most likely be launched shortly.

The finest club to work for if you're a car enthusiast to learn how to construct your own race car is FORMULA-MANIPAL. They do produce some awesome goods.







Volunteer Service Organization is your station if you need social assistance. Simple to get into and make you feel good.



We have our own, MTTN, Manipal, if producing articles and news, obtaining sponsorships, and doing interviews with important people are your things.



Additionally, SUMMIT-MANIPAL, which is not as well-known as it should be, is for your MUN, or Model United Nation.



Last but not least - GDSC

UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY, BIKANER
Bikaner Technical University's University College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) Bikaner is a constituent college (BTU). It was previously known as Govt College of Engineering and Technology before becoming a constituent college of BTU (GCET).
It was founded in 2007, as an autonomous entity of the Rajasthan government, amidst the brown flowers of Bikaner's desert island. Bikaner Technical University was founded in 2017, and UCET became a constituent college soon after.
It has earned a name for itself by promoting high-quality education.

UNIVERSITY COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY, BIKANER      

                                                            



Bikaner Technical University's University College of Engineering and Technology (UCET) Bikaner is a constituent college (BTU). It was previously known as Govt College of Engineering and Technology before becoming a constituent college of BTU (GCET).

COLLEGE OF TECHNOLOGY AND ENGINEERING, UDAIPUR (CTAE)

                                                 



The Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, Udaipur's College of Technology and Engineering (CTAE) is a constituent college of the Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, Udaipur.

The college first opened its doors in 1964.









The college has a well-equipped infrastructure with sophisticated state-of-the-art instruments/equipment in each discipline to provide students with hands-on instruction.

Student hostel-



The college offers nine hostels and one scientific hostel, all of which provide a welcoming atmosphere and a suitable setting for studying and living.

Every hostel has an Aquaguard water fridge, a TV, a geyser, and a well-furnished common area. Students in senior boys hostels have access to the internet at all hours of the day and night.











Hotel details-







Campus facilities-



Library-



The college library has a large collection of books, bound journals, reference materials, PhD theses, standards, and CD-ROMs, among other things.

The KOHA Software is used to computerise all of the library's activities.









Sports-



The college includes well-equipped sports fields where students can participate in a variety of sports.







Laboratory-



For the advantage of students, the college provides departmental laboratories.







Banks Facilities-



For the convenience of lecturers and students, the university has two State Bank of India and Indian Bank ATMs.





Cafeteria-



CTAE Udaipur has a cafeteria where students may get healthy and sanitary cuisine.





Extra Curricular Activities-



PROGRAMMING CLUB



Students with a variety of interests, including coding, app development, machine learning, and web design, can gather at the Programming Club. The club is in charge of organising programming activities for CTAE Udaipur students.



Weekly workshops are organised by the club and focus on a variety of topics, including fundamental programming, web design languages, machine learning methods, and mobile application development. The institute will hold programming contests to foster a culture of coding.



NSS



The NSS strives to help students realise their inner potential and change their minds so they can integrate into the society to which they belong.



With regards to the NSS's goals, it aims to help students and young people develop their interdisciplinary personalities so they can, in addition to their academic pursuits, build their ability for dealing with catastrophes and natural disasters, leadership abilities, and democratic views.



By promoting and assisting youth in taking an active part in socially beneficial and nation-building activities, the NSS Units of CTAE have been achieving the goals of NSS and have also been crucial in the personality development of young people.

RAJASTHAN TECHNICAL UNIVERSITY, KOTA                           

                                                



Rajasthan Technical Institution (RTU) is a government-affiliated university in Kota, Rajasthan, India.

It is home to a number of associated colleges.

Academic buildings and sports complexes are within walking distance of hostels.





Campus facilities-



Library-



The institute has a well-equipped library with a book lending system that is automated.

It is one of the institute's most essential resource centres, serving both students and teachers.





There are almost 1,17,000 books in the library's collection.

A vast number of national and international online journals covering all areas are subscribed to.

Sports-



Sports are promoted and encouraged at the university in order to foster a healthy lifestyle.

Badminton, basketball, and volleyball courts are available at the university.

Cricket, football, and hockey are all played on the University's field.

Various inter- and inter-college sporting competitions are organised by the university.

.



Extra Curricular Activities-



Techno-Cultural Clubs: Through these Clubs, students are motivated to expand their extracurricular interests. To pique their curiosity is the goal. The University acknowledges the importance of nurturing the talent and provides the resources and acts as a catalyst for identical.

Living and learning are intricately paired together in residential life at JU hostels. They provide the ideal environment for the educational pursuits because they are carefully planned and run.







1. The Innovatsiya Club - The group was established in order to conceal all technical domains, including aeromodeling, automobiles, and artificial intelligence. Ju formerly had an Aeromodelling club, but it wasn't functioning properly, along with the artificial intelligence club, thus the club was founded to conceal these.

The purpose of the club is to demonstrate how we may construct our own RC PLANES, ROBOTS using Arduino boards, and a variety of other things. Your creativity is the only restriction on what you can create.



2. The 3C Catchy Cultural Club: Creates a whole distinct team for the JU cultural event.



3. Fleet Club: Fleet Club was established to improve the students' programming abilities.



4. E-Cell Club: The Entrepreneurship Cell (E-Cell) of JECRC University seeks to foster an entrepreneurial spirit among its students. E Cell, a group sponsored by students that was founded in 2015, is seen as being a key component of the Associate in Nursing system for Fostering Entrepreneurship at JECRC University.



5. Swarag Club: The SWARAAG Musical Club was established with the motto "Verbreiten Sie die Freude a der Musik," which means "to disclose the delight of music." This club has a reputation for being at its best when there are genuine feelings, dedications, devotions, and, of course, innovations involved, which are still acknowledged by those whose lives have been affected by the club over the last four years.



6. Terra Club: Develop knowledge, awareness, a flexible mindset, and values that help members of the community contribute to preserving and improving the environment.



7. Maverick Club: The Maverick Club's goal is to create a certificate-granting environment where enthusiastic photography students can share their skills, knowledge, and enthusiasm for the art form while attending JECRC University.



8. Abhivyakti Club: This theatre club hosts a variety of events, including Nukkad Natak, rise-up comedy, skits, stree plays, singing, dancing, and acting. All of these events are held at JECRC University's abhivyakti, the theatre club. Through participation in theatrical performances, Abhivyakti Club gives opportunities for social and academic development.







9. Srijana Club: Srijana may be a word from the Sanskrit language that means "creation." The club's primary goal is to promote students in the field of creation. It's a Club that is open to any students who are interested in expressing their talent via style. Through its many fashion events, this group will boost the skills and enthusiasm of freshmen students.



10. Masterchef Club: The JECRC University's Master Chef Club offers students the option to express their enthusiasm for cooking via culinary innovation, presentation, creativity, and skill.



11. GDSC - A club by Google which particularly consists of the students of CSE who are very much interested in development and hackathons.

Student Hostels-



At the University, there are separate hostels for males and girls, each with all of the necessary amenities.

The campus has a total of 12 hostels with a capacity of more than 500 students.











Campus facilities-



Library:



With approximately 4000 volumes, magazines, research papers, and journals, the University Library is one of the greatest in the state.

Teachers and kids both benefit significantly from the library.







Laboratories:



Many science-based courses are offered at the university, and each lab is supplied with the required equipment and staffed by a lab assistant for the benefit of students.



Classrooms:



To improve the academic environment, the classrooms are adequately ventilated and airy.



Auditorium:



The University has a state-of-the-art auditorium for formal functions and activities.



Canteen:



There is a sanitary canteen at the University that is run by a separate mess crew.



Extracurricular activity-



Codechef-

The programming groups known as CodeChef College Chapters are supervised by CodeChef and managed by the recognised chapter leaders. CodeChef MBM invites all coding enthusiasts to foster a culture of competition in programming at our university.



Debating Club-

The college's debate group, which has been around for 40 years, aims to help members develop their soft skills. The club's main goal is to plan meetings and hold activities at the college that will aid students in developing their public speaking and writing skills.



AI club-

Club AI is a platform to bring together all AI enthusiasts and offer them the tools and assistance they need to advance their knowledge of AI The organisation also provides members with several opportunities to advance their soft skills, presentation skills, and managerial abilities.



Robotic Club-

carries out robotics and embedded system research workshops ranging from beginner to expert levels aids students in taking part in numerous technical and robotics competitions promotes peer mentoring Juniors benefit from the knowledge and experience of senior students. encourages children to take part in a variety of robotics competitions that are held throughout India. Every year, students compete in robotics competitions and win prizes from several institutions, including IIT Bombay.







Placement-

full_content:
SATHYABAMA INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY 

                          



Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai is a Christian Minority Institution established in 1987. 

It is a deemed-to-be University accredited with Grade ‘A’ by National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). 



Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate and Doctoral Programs.



Important information regarding the institute-



Location-



Address-

Jeppiaar Nagar, SH 49A, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600119

https://maps.app.goo.gl/DpL2Vcy4LryABZ6i8





 Campus area-It has a campus of 400 acres.

Student Hostels-



The Institution is housing 5 hostels for Boys and 5 hostels for Girls in a gargantuan area of 16,75,000 SquarAll the academic and daily needs of the students are on the campus and within reach for each student, making hostel life pleasant and comfortable. 

Hostels are within reachable distance from classrooms and sports facilities, to support the ease in mobility.

All the hostels possess well-ventilated living rooms attached to bathrooms.

Air-conditioned rooms facility is also available in the hostels.

Students can avail the Laundry facility twice a week for Washing and ironing their clothes.



Campus facilities-



Library-



It serves as a significant learning and resource centre for the institute. 

The library collection includes 302131 books in subjects like Management, Engineering, Architecture, Law, Pharmacy, Design, Nursing, Dental, etc.



 

The state-of-the-art facilities of the library contribute to providing a world-class academic institute.



Sports-



The institute has produced sportsmen of the highest calibre who have represented the country in various sports like volleyball, basketball, etc. 

There is a tennis court, 2 indoor basketball courts, 2 tennis stands, 2 football fields, 2 hockey fields, and 4 kabaddi courts on the institute campus.









Wifi-



Wi-Fi Facility is also been provided in the hostels as well as in the central library.



Auditorium-



There are 4 open theatres and 3 conference halls on campus. 

All air-conditioned halls are equipped with the latest teaching aids like slide projector, LCD projector, and overhead projector.





The conference halls are used for conducting seminars, placement training programs, guest lectures, etc.



Extracurricular activity-



Cognitube club-

The Psychology of Sustainability - An Applied Perspective was the topic of a seminar presented by Cognitive Club in collaboration with the Department of Psychology on June 17, 2022 at the International Research Centre Auditorium. The invited discussion on this subject by Dr. Deviga, Assistant Professor and Head of the Department of Psychology, SDNB Vaishnav, was attended by students from many academic fields.



Media club-

On March 9, 2022, the Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology's media club hosted a webinar by Mr. Alphonse Roy on the topic of "Wildlife Photography."



Robotic club-

Students that enjoy building mechanical peers that may even be able to function without human assistance can join the robotics club. Along with offering the essential direction, this family provides each member with mechanical, production, and electronic informatory aid.



Music club-

to recognise and promote student musical talent.

in order to motivate club members to compete in various music competitions held both on and off campus.

AC (Air-Conditioned) and Non-AC single and shared bed options.

Student Hostels-



VIT Vellore provides accommodation to its students. Rooms are well furnished and large.

There are a total of 24; hostels out of which 18 blocks are boys hostels and the rest are girls hostels. All basic facilities are available at hostels.

The details are given below in the table.











Hostel Facilities-



AC (Air-Conditioned) and Non-AC single and shared bed options.

Rooms equipped with ergonomically designed furniture which includes a cot, chair, study table, study lamp, bookshelf and a cupboard.

First aid centre, pharmacy, photocopy service, food kiosks, gymnasium (AC & Non-AC), swimming pool, sports amenities, laundry service, Wi-Fi service, beauty salon, tailoring unit, driving, dance and music classes, utility shop and visitor rooms.

Residential Counselors, Wardens, Supervisors, maintenance staff and security guards available 24x7.

Security guard to chaperone and safe transit students to and from the campus to the nearest railway station and bus stops for late night / early hours of the day.

24 hours water supply and power supply supported by stand-by captive generators.



Campus facilities-



Periyar Central Library-



The central library of VIT Vellore is a six-storey building. 

It is spread over an area of 7770 square meters. Students can find books, journals, research papers, publications etc. at the campus. Further, the library also has e-books, CDs and DVDs for students. 







The Central Library subscribes to national and international journals in print and e-Journals. 

The library has a video conferencing facility and NPTEL video courses.



Guesthouse-



To accommodate the visiting faculty and family members of students, the university has a well-maintained guest house.







Gym-



There are two gyms on the campus, one for boys and one for girls students. 

Both the gyms have modern equipment to ensure students can achieve their dream physique. 







Sports-



For students who are interested in sports, the university has facilities for indoor and outdoor sports. 

The university conducts sports tournaments at regular intervals for students. 

Students are encouraged to participate in sports events.  



Extracurricular activity-



Kraftigo-

In order to safeguard the unprotected interests of the Indian craftsmen, Kraftigo was established. After touring numerous communities in southern India, we came to appreciate the beauty of Indian handmade techniques. Our goal is to give them a suitable platform for connecting with potential clients, and our ongoing support for innovation will make sure they stay up to date on industry trends.



Bukkad-

As is typical, it all started with a single query: Why can't my meals taste nice, be natural, simple to prepare, and be beneficial for my body? We at Bhukkad are pleased to announce that we have solved the mystery. We produce cuisine that is quick, fresh, exciting, delicious and inexpensive. 





The pen world of the top pen brands. Quickest Service is guaranteed.



Sangrash-

Community development and inspiration through an NGO

An initiative started by VIT University first-semester students that aims to improve rural life quality and social transformation



Helpmyprep-

providing superior study materials and college comparisons.

Helpmyprep's mission is to offer a one-stop shop for all student needs regarding how to handle any issues that arise after they complete their 12th grade education.

This will assist them in making the proper decision and achieving their objectives.

Extracurricular activity-
Samskriti-
On April 26, 2012, Sampoojya Swami Poornamritananda Puri, the cultural arm of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Amritapuri campus, issued the first-ever quarterly student journal, Samvit, as part of Samavarnam 2012, the annual cultural event.
Amrita sanjibeeni-
The Amritapuri Campus' student-run seva association, Amrita Sanjeevani, operates under the motto "Pray with your heart and serve with your hands." Amrita Sanjeevani plans youth retreats, public awareness initiatives, and charity events. Through its actions, the organization has already funded the education of a number of kids.

Astronomy club-
 The Amrita Astronomy Club was established during the International Year of Astronomy (2009) for both individual and group educational and scientific reasons.
creating and executing initiatives to improve astronomical awareness and understanding among all interested parties, particularly on the Amritapuri Campus and in the neighborhood;
Robotic club-
The Amrita Robotics Club was founded with the intention of fostering a culture of robotics interest among the student body.
Robotics provides students with the chance to practice and hone numerous multi-disciplinary abilities as one of the promising emerging fields in India.

Placements-
The average package offered during Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham BTech placements 2021 was INR 5.8 LPA. Further, the highest package offered during Amrita University BTech placements 2021 was INR 56.95 LPA.

overview:

AMRITA VISHWA VIDYAPEETHAM, COIMBATORE 

                             



Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham is a world-class, research-intensive institution with a national and international reputation as an educational institution providing higher education in an ambience rooted in rich Indian culture and heritage. 



Based in the Coimbatore campus, the research centres are envisioned as a platform to encourage and enhance research among the faculty of Amrita Schools of Business, Communication, Engineering and Social Work.

Campus facilities-



Library-



The institute has a library that has an abundant collection of books, periodicals and other online resources such as e-journals, e-books, conference proceedings, e-databases, project reports, back-volumes, CD/DVDs resources and newspapers. 



Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Coimbatore has a centrally air-conditioned digital library named Amrita Digital Library.





Sports-



Students of Amrita University are encouraged to take part in various indoor and outdoor sports such as hockey, basketball, kabaddi, tennis, shuttle badminton, ball badminton, throw-ball, volleyball, cricket, football, table tennis, weight lifting, powerlifting, handball, tennikoit, etc.



Guest Room-



Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Coimbatore facilities include a guest house that has a total of 20 ac rooms, 4 ac suites, 20 non-ac rooms, conference hall and dining hall. 

The guest house has all the necessary amenities to ensure a comfortable stay for the visiting faculty, parents, company executives, administrators, etc.



Banks Facilities-



The campus has a branch of Dhanlaxmi Bank along with an ATM to provide banking facilities.



Extracurricular activity-



Samskriti-

On April 26, 2012, Sampoojya Swami Poornamritananda Puri, the cultural arm of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Amritapuri campus, issued the first-ever quarterly student journal, Samvit, as part of Samavarnam 2012, the annual cultural event.



Amrita sanjibeeni-

The Amritapuri Campus' student-run seva association, Amrita Sanjeevani, operates under the motto "Pray with your heart and serve with your hands." Amrita Sanjeevani plans youth retreats, public awareness initiatives, and charity events. Through its actions, the organization has already funded the education of a number of kids.







Astronomy club-

 The Amrita Astronomy Club was established during the International Year of Astronomy (2009) for both individual and group educational and scientific reasons.

creating and executing initiatives to improve astronomical awareness and understanding among all interested parties, particularly on the Amritapuri Campus and in the neighborhood;





Robotic club-

The Amrita Robotics Club was founded with the intention of fostering a culture of robotics interest among the student body.

Robotics provides students with the chance to practice and hone numerous multi-disciplinary abilities as one of the promising emerging fields in India.







Placements-



The average package offered during Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham BTech placements 2021 was INR 5.8 LPA. Further, the highest package offered during Amrita University BTech placements 2021 was INR 56.95 LPA.

ANNA UNIVERSITY, CHENNAI

                                                       



Anna University is a state-level university located in Chennai, India. It is recognised by the UGC and accredited with an ‘A’ grade by the NAAC. 

Anna University has been ranked 16th among top universities in India by NIRF 2021. 



Anna University has 13 constituent colleges, 3 regional campuses, and 593 affiliated colleges. 

At present, the university is offering various UG, PG, Research programs.

CEG campus has around 12 hostels for boys(11 regular and 1 NRI).

In all these hostels, rooms have to shared by students belonging to the first three years. It is only in the fourth year that students get single rooms allocated to them.







All hostels are provided with good WiFi connections and a common TV.



Campus facilities-



Library-



The library is located on the main campus's eastern side, in a three-story building. 

It has a total space of approximately 4122 square meters. 

Thirty video cameras have been strategically positioned throughout the Anna University library for surveillance. The library has a total of 10,157 registered users. 







It offers various knowledge-based services to its patrons, including reference, bibliography, MALIBNET, DELNET, reprography, internet browsing, and e-services.

Medical facilities-



The Health Centre at Anna University serves students, researchers, staff members and their families. Special consultations are held once a week with health experts. 

A week-day functioning physiotherapy clinic is at disposal. 

The medicines prescribed by the Medical Officers at the Health Centre are at free cost to both students and staff. 





24/7 ambulance and emergency services are at the disposal of both staff and students. 



Extracurricular activity-



Students association-

The official organisation for representing students at the college is the Students Association of CEG, also known as SA-CEG. They serve as a conduit for information between the administration and the students and speak out on issues pertaining to education and welfare.



Arts society-

The extracurricular and cultural endeavours of CEG are of primary significance to the college's Arts Society. It serves as the venue for Techofes, the largest intercollege cultural festival in India. Since 1948, it has aided in fostering and spotting potential in domains outside than engineering academia



CEG Tech-

The CEG Tech Forum was established in 2006 with the specific goal of fostering any product of creative thinking and offering a strong student limb for its growth. It is the technical centre

of the college where every concept, no matter how bizarre or little, is monitored as it prepares to surpass existing standards.



Literary-

The official campus publication of CEG, AC Tech, and SAP is The Guindy Times. This student publication serves as a media outlet with the mission of regularly updating readers on all college-related events.



Pixels-

Two hardworking seniors, Smrittika Sasidhar and Michael Jernil, who both had a strong interest for photography, started the club in 2017. Their goal was to establish a community of photographers who would experiment, learn, and express their talent.



Astro-

This group is solely focused on research, technology, aeronautics, and space science. By demonstrating the joy of astronomical and planetary science, we identify and inspire the Universal Passion for THE DEEP SPACE and astronautics.



Robotics-

The Robotics Club of CEG was established with the specific purpose of encouraging students' innovative spirits. This group encourages interest in robotics by teaching kids new skills that are also beneficial to their future careers.

hostel_info:
The institute provides comfortable accommodation facilities for the students. 

There are a total of six girls’ hostels and nine boys’ hostels accommodating over 2400 girls and 4000 boys.

The hostel rooms with or without air-conditioning facilities are available on a sharing basis. 

The hostels provide a good atmosphere with a pleasant ambience. 

State of the art amenities is available for dining, living, and recreation that give a home-like feel to each student.
campus_facilities:
The university provides a bank and post office facility near the campus. 

Indian overseas bank’s two branches are available within the SASTRA University campus that can be accessed any time in a whole day and the postal services are available within the campus by the department of post and telegraph.
Extra curricular activity-
The various SASTRA student clubs, such as the Auto Club, Literary Club, Oratory and Debating Club, Fine Arts Club, JAM Club, Quiz Club, etc., hold weekly meetings to help students discover and develop their hidden talents by providing them with specialized instruction and practice in the relevant fields.
The School of Humanities & Sciences' Athenaeum and None such Club planned a number of meetings to help students, especially freshmen, improve their speaking abilities. In numerous inter-college cultural events like SAARANG, FESTEMBER, RIVERA, etc. These groups have assisted SASTRA in earning top honors.
The SASTRA's National Level Annual Technical and Cultural Festivals, DAKSH & KURUKSASTRA, are organized with fanfare by the many student clubs and organizations.

SASTRA hosts inter- and intra-college sporting events under the names COLOSSEUM & FUERA.
The Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs, New Delhi, hosted the Sixth National Youth Parliament Competition, and the final round of the national level competition took place there. This time, the discussion centred on social and economic topics such terrorism, ground water pollution, India's stance in the WTO, and the Common Civil Code. All kids performed exceptionally well, using scripts that had been thoroughly researched. Seven pupils have been chosen to attend a live session of parliament.

The university provides a bank and post office facility near the campus. 



Indian overseas bank’s two branches are available within the SASTRA University campus that can be accessed any time in a whole day and the postal services are available within the campus by the department of post and telegraph.



Extra curricular activity-



The various SASTRA student clubs, such as the Auto Club, Literary Club, Oratory and Debating Club, Fine Arts Club, JAM Club, Quiz Club, etc., hold weekly meetings to help students discover and develop their hidden talents by providing them with specialized instruction and practice in the relevant fields.



The School of Humanities & Sciences' Athenaeum and None such Club planned a number of meetings to help students, especially freshmen, improve their speaking abilities. In numerous inter-college cultural events like SAARANG, FESTEMBER, RIVERA, etc. These groups have assisted SASTRA in earning top honors.







The SASTRA's National Level Annual Technical and Cultural Festivals, DAKSH & KURUKSASTRA, are organized with fanfare by the many student clubs and organizations.







SASTRA hosts inter- and intra-college sporting events under the names COLOSSEUM & FUERA.



The Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs, New Delhi, hosted the Sixth National Youth Parliament Competition, and the final round of the national level competition took place there. This time, the discussion centred on social and economic topics such terrorism, ground water pollution, India's stance in the WTO, and the Common Civil Code. All kids performed exceptionally well, using scripts that had been thoroughly researched. Seven pupils have been chosen to attend a live session of parliament.



Placements-



SASTRA University placement and training cell professionally develops the students and crack interviews. Key highlights of SASTRA University placements 2021 are as follows:



Particulars

Statistics

Highest Salary

INR 27 LPA

No. of recruiters

70+

No. of offers

2,300+

Top recruiters

Ashok Leyland Ltd., Maruti Udyog Ltd., Reliance Petrochemicals, Hyundai Motor India Ltd. and ICICI Bank, among others

SRI SIVASUBRAMANIYA NADAR COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING 

                     



Sri Sivasubramaniya Nadar College of Engineering, popularly known as SSN College of Engineering or simply SSN, is a private engineering college located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. 



It is an autonomous college affiliated with Anna University founded by Shiv Nadar.

full_content:
PSG COLLEGE OF TECHNOLOGY, COIMBATORE 

                          



PSG College of Technology, an ISO 9001:2015 certified institution is one of the foremost institutions founded by the PSG & Sons' Charities Trust (1926). 



Provide world-class Engineering Education, Foster Research and Development. Evolve innovative applications of Technology



Important information regarding the institute-



Location-



Address-

Avinashi Rd, Peelamedu, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641004



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/DDM24mwDPrKbmqkR6







Campus area-The campus is spread over 45 acres of land.



Reaching the institute-

The approximate driving distance between Coimbatore Railway Station and Psg College Of Technology is 5 km or 3.1 miles or 2.7 nautical miles.



Details of engineering courses offered by the institute-



Courses

Eligibility

Streams

B.Tech

Qualification- Passed Class 12 from a recognised board with 50%.



Exams Accepted: TNEA

Biotechnology

Information Technology

Fashion Technology

Textile Technology

Semester

Tuition Fees

1

₹88140



Student Hostels-



PSG tech hostel facility is very good compared to another hostel. 

PSGCT has 9 hostels for boys(7 hostels) and girls(2 hostels) accommodates more than 4000 students.

It is a very secular place to stay and also CCTV surveillance is monitored for 24 X 7. 

Rooms are comfortable to live in and electricity is also provided for 24 X 7 and students never eace electric shortage problem as well as water facility too. there is in the number of blocks available both Gents and Ladies hostel.





Food facilities are available in both Veg and Non-Veg (both Wednesday and Sunday) menus 

It will change month by month according to the weekly scheduled food table which is attached in the Mess. 



Campus facilities-



Library-



The library houses over 2,50,00 books,  240 journals as well as 9000 online journals. 

The resources are accessible and can be availed through an online portal implemented by an integrated Library Management System (PSG-ILMS). 

A digital library with 60 computers is run through high-speed internet connectivity. 



The library has sections classifying books as per engineering, science, references and book bank.



Auditorium-



The college has an auditorium facility for events and seminars







Wifi-



The college has a state of the art computing facility with wi-fi enabled 16 Mbps leased line internet connectivity.



Medical facility-



Students have affordable and easy access to PSG Hospitals located near the college campus and first aid boxes available all over the campus for student need and safety.



Extracurricular activity-



Astronomy club-

insomniacs, driven by man's lone need to gaze upward in order to comprehend our place in the world and our insignificance compared to nature. Join us as we embark on an exploration of the cosmos through stargazing, seminars, discussions, and other enjoyable activities as one of the most distinctive astrophiles clubs at PSG Tech.



QUIZZERS-

When PSG Tech students who had the same interests gathered together to take tests within and outside of the campus, ASQ was born. They transformed their meetings into unofficial quizzes that established the Association of Serious Quizzers. The Freshers Quiz, which is only open to new PSG Tech employees, is one of the key ASQ events. The winners will host the quiz for their successors.



Dramatic club-

A college-wide recruiting for the club's different categories—including dance, acting, set work, cinematography, and editing—began the 2019–20 academic year. Our activities, "FOOTLOOSE,"



English literary club-

At the ELS, we strive to instil confidence in each of our students. to give them confidence and to instil in them a love of the English language. So that it ceases to be a barrier and instead serves as a tool that will enable people to express themselves freely.



Fine arts club-

The PSG TECH FINE ARTS CLUB is divided into four distinct artistic branches: photography, multimedia, philately, and drawing and painting. This group serves as a venue for students to showcase their untapped skills. 





Tech music club-

The PSG College of Technology's official music club is called Tek Music. Since 1952, our group has been giving uplifting music and rhythms to numerous Tech generations. Throughout the academic year, we put on a range of performances, from Western contemporary music to Indian classical music. We perform a lot on campus, but we also compete in a lot of inter-college band events.





Placements-



According to the NIRF report 2021, the median package offered during PSG College UG (4-year) placements 2020 was INR 3.75 LPA. 

The key highlights of PSG College B.Tech UG (4-year) are given below -

Maharaja Surajmal Central Library supports the teaching & research programmes of three Institutes namely, Maharaja Surajmal Institute & Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology. 

All students, faculty members and employees of the Institute are entitled to make use of the Library facilities. 









The Library has a well-stocked fully computerised library with latest editions of books by eminent authors & is having a huge collection of books on education, management, computer science, engineering, pharmacy, science and humanities to cater to the needs and requirements of the faculty as well as students.

These extracurricular activities aid in the development of the pupils' personalities and levels of confidence. Bank: There is a banking facility on the institute's campus.

full_content:
GURU TEGH BAHADUR INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY

                            



Guru Tegh Bahadur Institute of Technology is a leading private aided college in Delhi, established in 1999 by the Delhi Sikh Gurdwara Management Committee [DSGMC]. GTBIT is affiliated to the Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University and recognized by AICTE for its academic standard.





Important information regarding GTBIT-



Location-



Address-

Mahakavi Goswami Tulsidas Marg, G-8 Area, Press Colony, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi 110064



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/MLr9gYiRai2TA1kB8





Campus size- 5 acres



Reaching GTBIT-

The Mayapuri station is the nearest one to Guru Tegh Bahadur Institute Of Technology in Delhi.



Details of engineering courses offered by GTBIT-



Course

Eligibility

Streams Offered in the course

B.Tech

10+2 + JEE Main & IPU CET

Computer Science And Engineering



Information Technology



Electrical And Electronics Engineering



Electronics & Communication Engineering



Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning



Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

B.Tech {Lateral}

10+3 + JEE Main & IPU CET

Computer Science & Engineering



Electrical And Electronics Engineering



Information Technology



Electronics & Communication Engineering



Artificial Intelligence And Data Science



Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning

₹97800

Student Hostels-



Currently hostel facilities are available in this college.



Campus facilities-



Library-



GTBIT library has a well equipped library with a collection of more than 53,000 books. 

Apart from books library also subscribes a large number of national and international online and print journals, wide variety of magazines, newspapers and non-book materials. 

GTBIT library support the teaching, research and extension programmes of the Institute. 



All Student, Faculty and Staff members are entitled to make use of the library facilities on taking library membership. Library aims to provide wide and efficient library and information services to the users.



Sports-



The College has Sports form an indispensable part of education because not only do they help in the maintenance of the physical fitness of the students but also teach them the true essence of sportsmanship i.e. an attitude to strive for fair play, courtesy toward teammates and opponents, ethical behaviour and integrity Sample of facilities for outdoor sports like cricket, football, volleyball and basketball are provided which help the students to test their physical endurance. 









Cafeteria-



The College cafeteria not only provides the best quality nutritious food to invigorate the students but also a vivid ambience which helps in the development of their interpersonal skills. 





The food served is prepared in highly hygienic conditions and is made available at very low and reasonable prices. 



Medical facility-



The college has a health centre with a first aid facility for the students.



Auditorium-



The college has a well-equipped conference/seminar hall where a variety of Academic and other activities take place throughout the year.





Extra Curricular Activities -







DSC - Developer Student Clubs (DSC) have been founded in GTBIT as a GOOGLE effort. On October 11th, 2017, GTBIT hosted the first Android Application Development Pilot Workshop. Shrreya Behll, Lead, Google Developer Student Clubs, led this workshop with help from her college team. All branches of first- and third-year students participated in this workshop. The students were able to overcome the barrier and begin with practical experience on Android application development thanks to this course, which covered Android as a whole. In the workshop, students also created their first simple UI-App.



Hello World - Coding has been continuously connecting the world to bring minds with ideas and advance a world of technology. The proper instruction and practice are what enable a programmer to thrive in his specialty. One learns more than simply the subject matter with the correct coaching. With its simple and obvious teaching, "HelloWorld" aims to teach you how to code from the beginning. Here, learning to code entails developing the ability to tackle as many issues as possible from a competitive standpoint.







TSG - The Technical Society of GTBIT was founded in 2002 with the goal of fostering scientific talent and creating a technophilic environment. Over the course of nine years, TSG has worked to provide ample opportunities for the young tech-minds to innovate a world of their own with the best technical knowledge encompassing every aspect of Engineering and related fields.







Apart from the clubs mentioned above there are some more clubs which offer fabulous extracurricular opportunities.



Placement-

All extracurricular activities that support both the educational goals of the institution and the needs of the students are encouraged by BPIT. According to BPIT, cultural activities are both the art and the intangible shared beliefs and customs of a group.

The students are encouraged by BPIT and given the chance to compete in several intercollege events at the zonal and national levels. For a variety of intercollege events, we give the team members shirts. Additionally, we always celebrate "Sports Day" with great fervour and excitement.

full_content:
Bhagwan Parshuram Institute of Technology

       



Bhagwan Parshuram Institute of Technology (BPIT) is a pioneer Institute providing education to the students of Delhi and outside Delhi in the field of engineering and management for more than a decade. 







Important information regarding BPiT-



Location-



Address-

PSP-4, Dr KN Katju Marg, Sector 17, Rohini, New Delhi, Delhi 110089



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/WWcY8TqgfVeXpibs5



Campus size-

The college campus size is about 6-7 acres.







Reaching BPIT-

G3s is a landmark for BPIT. For reaching BPIT you can either reach rithala metro station and take an e-rickshaw from there.or reach samaypur badli metro station and take e-rickshaw from there for g3s.

Student Hostels-



Considering the constraints of girls coming from far locations in Delhi or from outside Delhi, the BBCT-trustees constructed a double seated hostel for 128 girl students.











The hostel is fully furnished and has 24x7 security. 

The hostel also has all modern amenities for a decent stay and study.



Campus facilities-



Library-



BPIT library is fully air-conditioned with state of the art facilities, spacious reading rooms, separate computer rooms for students and faculty and a rich collection of books and periodicals including e-journals. 



It is fully automated and Wi-Fi enabled with an online reprography facility.



Medical facility-



The medical room is well equipped with basic health facilities and the stakeholders are being provided primary health care.



It is well stocked with the basic medicines, 



Seminar hall-



The Institute has three fully air-conditioned and well equipped Conference/Seminar Halls with modern audio-visual facilities for various activities such as expert talks, seminars, workshops, faculty development / management development / executive development programs, pre placement talks etc.





Internet facility-



The Internet Facility is available in BPIT campus via dedicated optical fibre link of 200 Mbps capacity. 

In order to provide fault tolerance, the air fibre link is also established. 



Canteen-



BPIT has a spacious canteen which maintains strict hygienic and sanitary conditions and serves quality meals, snacks and beverages at concessional rates. 

The canteen is located at a central place in the campus from where all the facilities can be served to the faculty members within a reasonable time. 



The Institute has an intercom facility and the canteen is also well-connected with all the rooms through the same. 



Sports-



The Sports Program at Bhagwan Parshuram Institute of Technology is designed to serve student interest in different sports and recreational activities. 



Outdoor sports-



Cricket



Football

Volleyball



Basketball



Badminton



INDOOR SPORTS-

Table tennis

Chess

Carom



Extra Curricular Activities-







The cultural events are one of the extracurricular activities that offer students a supportive environment to advance their intellectual, creative, or social growth. Students' self-esteem is greatly boosted when they participate in cultural events. They can confront the outside world with more assurance because of their swollen heads.



All extracurricular activities that support both the educational goals of the institution and the needs of the students are encouraged by BPIT. According to BPIT, cultural activities are both the art and the intangible shared beliefs and customs of a group.







The students are encouraged by BPIT and given the chance to compete in several intercollege events at the zonal and national levels. For a variety of intercollege events, we give the team members shirts. Additionally, we always celebrate "Sports Day" with great fervour and excitement.

campus_facilities:
Library:
Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta Institute of Technology and Management has a well-maintained library on the campus. 
The library system of ADGITM New Delhi consists of a Central Library and departmental libraries. 

The library has a well-stocked digital library with the latest recent editions of books by well-known authors and a large collection of books on education, management, computer science, engineering, and humanities to meet the needs and requirements of faculty and students.

Sports:
Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta Institute of Technology and Management has various outdoor and indoor sports facilities on the campus. 
The institute has a cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi ground, football ground, tug of war, race track and badminton court for students. Indoor games facilities, such as table tennis, carrom, and chess are available to on-campus students.

Extra Curricular Activities-
In ADGITM, there are many different societies to pick from. Let's examine each of the societies individually:
Enactus - The non-tech and nonprofit society of ADGITM is called Enactus. It is a global network of student leaders who employ business ventures to improve the world. Enactus ADGITM actively pursues this goal and is now managing three initiatives.

Dazzlers - This is the ADGITM's recognised Western dance organisation. This society's members are incredibly busy, holding frequent dance rehearsals, planning numerous workshops, and putting forth spine-tingling stage performances.

Yakshagna - The theatre group at ADGITM College is called Yakshagna. The team members continue to take part in various contests and theatre festivals while attempting to create a lasting impression with each of their performances.

IEEE - A group of individuals who are enthusiastic about technology make up IEEE, or the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers. The greatest technical professional association devoted to using technology to advance humanity is this one.

Freak Streets - This society is ideal for anyone who likes hip-hop, locking, or popping. The official street dancing organisation at ADGITM is called Freak Streets. Amazing street dancing battles are often held by this society, in which members take part.

Swaranjali - This is the college's official music society, as the name "Swaranjali" implies (i.e., musical). The society here plays a wide variety of music. By winning several competitions, the squad has attained numerous prestigious places.

Quintessence ADGITM - Do you want to improve your capacity for logical reasoning and critical thinking? You're covered by Quintessence in every way. This is the ADGITM's official debating organisation, which aids students in understanding the distinction between an argument and a debate based on relevant issues.

Confluenz - The ADGITM's photography and film society is called Confluenz. This group embraces all types of photographic abilities, from street photography to wildlife photography, and does n

The library system of ADGITM New Delhi consists of a Central Library and departmental libraries. 





The library has a well-stocked digital library with the latest recent editions of books by well-known authors and a large collection of books on education, management, computer science, engineering, and humanities to meet the needs and requirements of faculty and students.



Wifi-

ADGITM New Delhi is a Wi-Fi enabled campus with a high-speed internet connection to allow students to access the internet throughout the campus.



Cafeteria-



ADGITM New Delhi has a well-maintained canteen on the campus premises for students. 



The canteen serves nutritious and healthy meals to its students and the institute has a coffee shop and kiosks on the campus.



Sports-



Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta Institute of Technology and Management has various outdoor and indoor sports facilities on the campus. 

The institute has a cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi ground, football ground, tug of war, race track and badminton court for students. Indoor games facilities, such as table tennis, carrom, and chess are available to on-campus students.









Extra Curricular Activities-



In ADGITM, there are many different societies to pick from. Let's examine each of the societies individually:



Enactus - The non-tech and nonprofit society of ADGITM is called Enactus. It is a global network of student leaders who employ business ventures to improve the world. Enactus ADGITM actively pursues this goal and is now managing three initiatives.





Dazzlers - This is the ADGITM's recognised Western dance organisation. This society's members are incredibly busy, holding frequent dance rehearsals, planning numerous workshops, and putting forth spine-tingling stage performances.









Yakshagna - The theatre group at ADGITM College is called Yakshagna. The team members continue to take part in various contests and theatre festivals while attempting to create a lasting impression with each of their performances.





IEEE - A group of individuals who are enthusiastic about technology make up IEEE, or the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers. The greatest technical professional association devoted to using technology to advance humanity is this one.





Freak Streets - This society is ideal for anyone who likes hip-hop, locking, or popping. The official street dancing organisation at ADGITM is called Freak Streets. Amazing street dancing battles are often held by this society, in which members take part.





Swaranjali - This is the college's official music society, as the name "Swaranjali" implies (i.e., musical). The society here plays a wide variety of music. By winning several competitions, the squad has attained numerous prestigious places.



Quintessence ADGITM - Do you want to improve your capacity for logical reasoning and critical thinking? You're covered by Quintessence in every way. This is the ADGITM's official debating organisation, which aids students in understanding the distinction between an argument and a debate based on relevant issues.



Confluenz - The ADGITM's photography and film society is called Confluenz. This group embraces all types of photographic abilities, from street photography to wildlife photography, and does not necessarily require the use of professional tools or equipment. The club also organises a variety of photo walks focused on various aspects of photography.





Alfaaz - This is the ideal platform for you if you possess the ability to express yourself more effectively through words than through deeds. The official organisation for poetry and creative writing is called Alfaaz. From poetry to Shayari, book reviews to creative writing, the organisation welcomes and enjoys all forms of material.



E-cell ADGITM - E-cell is the ideal society for you if the stock market or other business-related topics fascinate you. One of the few business societies within ADGITM is the Entrepreneurship Cell. It concentrates on educating its aspiring business owners on investments, business, etc.

full_content:
JAMIA MILLIA ISLAMIA (JMI), UNIVERSITY

                                               

By an act of the Indian Parliament in 1988, Jamia Millia Islamia, which was founded in 1920 in Aligarh, United Provinces, India, became a Central University.

In Urdu language, Jamia means ‘University’, and Millia means ‘National’.





Important information regarding JMI-



Location-



Address-

Jamia Millia Islamia, Jamia Nagar, Okhla, New Delhi, Delhi 110025



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/88V9Mx5LzTm6miDd6





Campus size-254 acres



Reaching Jamia Millia Islamia-

The Okhla Vihar station is the nearest one to Jamia Millia Islamia in Delhi.



Engineering courses offered by the Institute-



Courses

Eligibility

Course fee

BTech

Civil Engineering



Electrical Engineering



Mechanical Engineering



Electronics & Communication Engineering

Campus facilities-



The Jamia Millia Islamia University has a wide range of facilities provided to students. Some of these are mentioned below:



Library-



Jamia Milia's Zakir Hussain Central Library is an air-conditioned library with a collection of 3.70 lakh books. 

It has a reading hall with a seating capacity for 1275 users. 

The Digital Resource Centre facilitates access to e-Journals and other in-house digitised e-resources. 







Learning Centre for Differently Abled provides support to visually impaired students through assistive technology. 

A federated search tool, Knimbus, is available to search journal articles in multiple databases.



Sports complex-



Sports facility available in Jamia Millia Islamia University are: 

Badminton Court

Basketball Court

Cricket Ground

Football Ground

Tennis Court

Volleyball Court

Athletics Track

Jogging Track

Hockey Ground

Fitness Centre

Snooker Room

Lawn Tennis Court

Shooting

Swimming

Wrestling

Boxing 



Classroom-



Well organised and furnished classrooms and digital boards are installed in every class to make sure a student must have a  better learning experience.







Extracurricular activity- 



Curricular activity- 



Through the departmental topic associations, Jamia Millia Islamia encourages co-curricular activities among its students. Academic events including student seminars, extension lectures, debating competitions, etc. are regularly organised by the Subject Associations of all the departments. Additionally, the associations make an effort to partner with community development initiatives that may be carried out by a particular Department or the University as a whole.







ZEST-



It was in the auspicious year of 2013, that we celebrated our first inter-college fest, ZEST – A Carnival Unleashed. The 2-day gala event, perfect blend of literary, sports and cultural events. Intercollege cricket championship was held (and yay, we won!). Day two was artful, brimming with the creativity of students. Tilasmi Matka were painted and Inspiring Wires were entangled. A number of on-stage competitions like the debate, Nukkad Natak and singing and dancing were such a success that they are still fresh in the memories of all who witnessed.

full_content:
INDIRA GANDHI DELHI TECHNICAL UNIVERSITY FOR WOMEN    

                                                                                                              



The Government of India created the Indira Gandhi Delhi Technical University for Women (IGDTUW). 





The NCT of Delhi established a non-affiliating university in May 2013 under the Delhi Act 09 of 2012 to facilitate and promote studies, research, technology, innovation, incubation, and extension work in emerging areas of professional education among women, with a focus on engineering, technology, applied sciences, architecture, 



Important information regarding IGDTUW-



Location-



Address-

James Church, New Church Rd, Opp. St, Kashmere Gate, New Delhi, Delhi 110006



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/3CztTDxnvjcbV4aLA



Campus size- 60 acres





Reaching IGDTUW-

Best way to reach IGDTUW is by metro. Nearest metro station is Kashmere Gate. 

It is situated just behind the Ritz cinema.



Details of engineering courses offered by the institute-

Eligibility

Student Hostels-



The university offers two women's dorms, Krishna Hostel and Kaveri Hostel, both with a capacity of 300 students.



\



These hostels give students a safe, secure, and clean environment in which to learn, grow, and mature in society away from their homes.

The hostel administration makes every effort to provide a conducive environment for students to study, succeed academically, and concentrate on their profession and future.

Individual beds, chairs, built-in cabinets, and study desks are provided in each of the twin/triple rooms.



Campus facilities-



Library-



IGDTUW Delhi facilities include a library known as the Learning Resource Center (LRC). 

The library has many books, journals, etc. 





There is also a dedicated digital section of the library and it includes e-materials like CDs, DVDs and digital thesis of final year students.



Bank-



The Punjab and Sind bank is available in the university premises.







Guest house-



The guest house within the campus has limited accomdation for the staying purpose of individuals visiting the campus. 

The rooms are comfortable with all modern facilities available within.



Dispensary-



The main objective of the opening of the university dispensary was to provide primary health care mainly in the form of first aid to the university students.



The dispensary has all emergency facilities like oxygen, Nebuliser along with arrangements for minor surgical equipment.



The dispensary is equipped with over the counter medications, bed to rest in, medical equipment, physical screening tools and first aid supplies. 



Extracurricular Activity-



Collegiate SAE Club

An Indian company called SAE India is a member of SAE International. In addition to having a student chapter at their campus, MAE students are active SAE India members. With events that put classroom instruction into practise by challenging students to design, build, and test the performance of a real car in a competitive atmosphere, SAE expands into educational institutions and infuses passion.





The Eco club, or Greensphere

The goal of IGDTUW's environment club, GREENSPHERE, is to raise students' understanding of environmental issues.





Club Sports

This sports club was established to foster teamwork and good sportsmanship among the eager technocrats.Youth leadership movement founded mostly by non-profit organisation, Leaders for Tomorrow.

BVCOE Library is an organised collection of sources of information and Similar Resources, made accessible to a defined community for reference or borrowing. 

It provides physical or digital access to material, and may be a Physical Building, or a Virtual Space, or both.

Sports:
BVCOE, New Delhi always emphasised on the overall development of the students. 
In this direction, the Annual Sports meet of the college is organised every year in which Students of all branches actively participate. 
It includes indoor and as well as outdoor Events (like Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Badminton, Athletics, Table Tennis, Carom etc). 

Winners of the respective events are facilitated with Medals and Trophy
overview:
BHARTI VIDHYAPEETH'S COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING
Since its inception in 1999, Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering in New Delhi has worked to give the best engineering education to its students by employing highly trained and motivated professors and providing well-equipped modern labs.
BVCOE, which is affiliated with Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University in New Delhi and accredited by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), Ministry of HRD, Government of India, is slowly progressing in its mission to become one of North India's top engineering institutions.

BHARTI VIDHYAPEETH'S COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING 

                                      



Since its inception in 1999, Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering in New Delhi has worked to give the best engineering education to its students by employing highly trained and motivated professors and providing well-equipped modern labs.







BVCOE, which is affiliated with Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University in New Delhi and accredited by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), Ministry of HRD, Government of India, is slowly progressing in its mission to become one of North India's top engineering institutions.



Important information regarding BVCOE-

Spread across 85 acres of land.



Reaching BVCOE-
