Student Hostels-



The college has a girl's hostel facility which provides good hostel accommodation for the students.

The hostels are well equipped and air conditioned.





 The average rental per student is close to 2k per month and rooms are available on a shared basis. 



There is no hostel option for boys. There are many PG's near college, and their rooms and facilities are good. 



Campus facilities-



Library-



BVCOE Library is an organised collection of sources of information and Similar Resources, made accessible to a defined community for reference or borrowing. 







It provides physical or digital access to material, and may be a Physical Building, or a Virtual Space, or both.



Sports-



BVCOE, New Delhi always emphasised on the overall development of the students. 

In this direction, the Annual Sports meet of the college is organised every year in which Students of all branches actively participate. 



It includes indoor and as well as outdoor Events (like Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Badminton, Athletics, Table Tennis, Carom etc). 







Winners of the respective events are facilitated with Medals and Trophy



Medical Facility-



The college has a health centre with a first aid facility for the students.



Extracurricular activity-



Robotix United, Inc.-



The official technical club of the IEEE student branch of Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering in New Delhi is called Robotix United. In order to fill the knowledge gap between students and technical expertise, Robotix United offers robotics-related technicalities. It is a richer source of information for robots and embedded systems. The oldest robotics organisation in BVCOE, Robotix United is a part of IEEE's student section there. It seeks to disseminate information about robotics, whether technical or not, and put into practise suggestions made by its members.



Code-x -



Code-X is a BVPIEEE Special Interest Group for programmers. By closing the knowledge gap between experts and novices, we hope to raise programming standards. We regularly organise teaching sessions, offline programming competitions, quizzes, and challenges. maintaining a level that is as pleasant as feasible for pro-coders and tyros.







E-Cell-



Students can communicate with experts and industrialists from a variety of sectors on a platform made available by E-Cell (Entrepreneurship Cell), BVPIEEE, and IEEE-HKN. Group discussions, conferences, and a variety of other interactive sessions are organised by E-Cell to help students create a professional environment.



Dance- 



A group of enthusiastic dancers from a variety of dance genres, including Hip Hop, Whacking, Dancehall, House, Animation, Popping, Locking, Kathak, Bharatnatyam, and Breaking, make up AURA, a union of raw artists. Dancers simply believe in the value of hard work, which is why we work on our technique day and night and feed our passion for the art form by following the music's cues.





Placement-



About 85% -90% of students from our college get a job. 

The average salary package for our college is around 5 LPA - 7 LPA varies from time to time. 

The highest pay package will be approximately 20 LPA provided by Adobe, with the lowest package being 3.45 LPA provided by TCS. 

The roles provided here are software engineer, sales, web developer, etc.

GGSIPU (Gurugram Gobind Singh Indraprastha University) was the first university created by the government in 1998.

Student Hostels-



The University operates four dorms on campus, two for male students and two for female students.

Shivalik Hostel and Aravali Hostel are the names of two boy's hostels, while Nilgiri Hostel and Satpura Hostel are the names of two girl's dormitories.













Over 180 single seat rooms are available in each hostel.

Each room has basic furnishings such as a cot, pillow, chair, table, and cabinet, as well as a tube light and a fan.

The tenants of each hostel have access to a mess room.

Campus facilities-



Library-



GGSIPU library is completely furnished with a broad assortment of books and periodicals. 

It is additionally upheld with computerised learning assets like ACM Digital Library, DELNET, EBSCO databases, SCIRUS, INFLIBNET and some more.





Canteen-



In order to satisfy the appetites of the students and to give them a break after a half day's hard work the University campus is provided with a relaxing and comfortable canteen. 





The canteen not only provides the student's of the campus with mouth watering dishes like 'Sambhar-Vada', Sambar-Idli', 'Rajma-Chawal', 'Uttapam','Fried-Rice', 'Spring Rolls','Thali' etc.



Bank-

 

The Indian Bank is available in the University. All the admission application forms are sold through GGS IP University, Dwarka Branch.





Playground-



The University Campus also gives the students the facility of several grounds so that they can play and enjoy themselves in their free time.

It has basketball courts, volleyball court and cricket playground, Football Ground, Running Track, Kabaddi Ground etc. 



Health centre-



The GGSIPU health centre is well-stocked with first-aid and common-advice drugs. It is overseen by a licenced medical officer.

Campus facilities-



Library-



It provides one of the Institute's most essential academic services. It is a well-equipped Library that is centrally placed and simple to reach, and it stimulates the intellectual growth of students, instructors, research scholars, and others in the area.









The Library's knowledge resources are mostly in the fields of science and technology, humanities and social sciences, management, and other relevant fields.



The Library is now fully computerised, with an integrated system connected to the Campus Network, allowing the institutional community to access e-resources.



Guest house-



The Institute Guest House, which is surrounded by verdant lawns and colourful horticulture, is a lovely retreat for Institute Guests, whether they are from academia, alumni, or parents of students.



The state-of-the-art Guest House, complete with all modern amenities, is unique in the North East.











Games & Sports facilities-



The Institute features a 150m x 90m playground where students can play football, cricket, hockey, and other sports.

The institute also has a Sports Complex where students can participate in a variety of outdoor and indoor sports.

NIT Silchar also features a hard court for basketball and volleyball, as well as hard courts for badminton and volleyball.

On the campus, there is a Lawn Tennis court. Overall, the institute offers enough game and sports facilities.



Bank-



On campus, the State Bank of India operates a fully computerised full-fledged core-banking branch.

The branch's services are available to students, staff, and residents of the areas surrounding the university.





Post office-



A sub Post Office is located on the Institute's campus.

Registration, money orders, and speed mail are all available at the subpost office.

From 9.30 a.m. to 2.30 p.m., the post office is open.

Students, employees, and residents from the neighbouring communities use and benefit from the services provided by this Post Office.





Health care-



The Institute has a Health Centre with a full-time Senior Medical Officer and other competent Medical Officers to help students, employees, and their families with medical issues.

overview:
NOIDA INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY
Established in 2001, Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET), is one among the popular technical colleges in Noida.
NIET Greater Noida is duly recognised by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and has been accredited with Grade A by National Assessment Accredited by Accreditation Council (NAAC). Student Hostels-



The college hostel provides a comfortable accommodation facility to the outstation students. 

There are total three hostels for students.







The rooms are well-ventilated and are available on sharing basis as well as for single individuals.



Campus facilities-



Library-



The libraries at NIET occupy over 14,000 square feet area and provide students access to a vast repository of resources, including books and periodicals. 

The peaceful and sunlit areas provide ideal study spaces. 



 The college library is fully automated and one can borrow books at any time. 

The library also has trained staff members to assist students.



Sports-



NIET sports facility provides both indoor and outdoor games. 

The outdoor games include basketball, football, handball, cricket, athletics, etc. 

The college provides indoor games like chess, carrom, badminton and many more. 









NIET sports department has also started Marathon Club, wherein students and other citizens can actively participate.



Banks Facilities-



The college has an on-campus bank facility and students and staff members can access ATM 24X7.



Cafeteria-



NIET cafeteria facility has hygienically prepared and quality food. Both students and the staff members can spend their free time enjoying the meal in the college cafeteria.



Hospital-



The college has a medical clinic on its campus and has trained medical officers. NIET medical facility is available for both students and staff members



Extra Curricular Activities -



Kalakriti





All of NIET's brilliant and inventive artists have come together to form the society. By producing gorgeous posters, banners, and other works of art, the society contributes significantly to every event held on campus. To keep the art and the artists active throughout the year, the group also organises several activities like poster-making competitions, etc. Members of the society frequently place first or second in prestigious intercollege competitions, demonstrating their talent on a variety of stages.



Theatre Society



For us, theatre is a way of life or, to put it another way, a way to alter a life. It's not just something we perform for an audience to amuse them. The street and stage divisions of the NIET theatre society, Kathputliyaan and The Jokers, respectively, have built a strong reputation for the college in prestigious theatre circuits. In addition, NIET is home to a number of independent theatre groups that were founded by our students and who get regular and enthusiastic mentoring from the organisation and its founding groups.







Sports Society



Everyone at NIET has always had a passion for sports. NIET provides grounds to numerous sports teams on campus, including NIET FC (football) and NIET Youth Club (volleyball), among others. In addition to this, a massive annual sports festival is held on campus each year when the entire sports fraternity congregates to celebrate the spirit of sports and uncover individual and group potential.



Gold Green Society



The organisation was designed to spread awareness of the advantages and benefits of the environment among the population. It mostly discusses the need for plantations in light of the danger posed by the ozone layer's thinning. It sponsors numerous planting campaigns in and near Greater Noida and raises public awareness of the advantages of nature's greenery on human health.



Editorial Club



The purpose of the editing club is to bring out the best in students so they may shine in extracurricular activities. In order to help the students overcome their stage fright or hesitation while speaking in front of an audience, this group organised debates and symposiums where they could have a basic platform to speak. Additionally, it is beneficial to keep the students informed about the current events taking place in their disciplines so that they can remain inspired and develop fresh ideas for their personal gain.











Cultural Society



The NIET cultural society is a group of students in charge of organising all of the institute's cultural activities throughout the year. It consists of four groups that handle different types of cultural activities. 



Sports Society



Everyone at NIET has always had a passion for sports. Numerous sports teams, including the NIET Cricket Team, NIET FC (football), and NIET Youth Club (volleyball), among others, have access to NIET's facilities for regular activities on campus. In addition to this, a massive annual sports festival is held on campus each year when the entire sports fraternity congregates to celebrate the spirit of sports and uncover individual and group potential.



Photography Club



NIET has a photographic club to handle all the extracurricular activities in addition to the academic ones. It was started in that year. For the students, this group occasionally plans a variety of events. We have a talented group of students who are passionate about documenting the unexpected events that happen on the college campus. The photography club hosts a variety of activities, including "Photography Workshop" and "Photography Talent Hunt."

full_content:
KRISHNA INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY 

                        



KIET Group of Institutions is recognized as one of the best engineering colleges in Delhi-NCR. 





Founded by the members of Krishna Charitable Society in 1998 with a modest number of 180 students, KIET Group of Institutions has now become a pioneer in the technical education domain with a strength of 6500+ students.

https://maps.app.goo.gl/iYp4hC28eypnDcHEA





Campus size- 18.2 acres





Reaching KIET-

Student Hostels-



Hostels are provided to boys and girls separately. 

All the hostel rooms are allotted to students based on the availability of rooms. 

All the hostels are provided with basic amenities for the comfortable stay of students. 

Facilities like WiFi, TV room and other indoor and outdoor game facilities are also provided for the hostellers. 

Mess facilities are also available inside the hostels which serves quality and hygienic food to students.



Campus facilities-



Library-



KIET Knowledge Resource Centre (KIET-KRC) was established in 1998. KIET–KRC has one Central Library which has a wide collection of books, periodicals, e-resources etc. 





It has more than 1.74 lakh books on Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Science, Humanities etc. with more than 10700 titles and has subscribed more than 136 print periodicals. 

It has also subscribed to E-resources (e-books, e-journals, articles etc.) through Myloft AKTU Nalanda E-consortium.



Banks Facilities-



An extension of PSB (Punjab Sind Bank) is situated just adjacent to the campus. ATM facility, at the gate of the institute assists the students in managing their finances.



Cafeteria-



A fully air conditioned double floored Cafeteria, with comfortable, ergonomics furniture with the capacity of around two hundred and fifty foodies is an essential vicinity at campus. 

Hygienic and lip smacking food is available at nominal price for the students. 

Around six refreshment outlets like Nescafe, Amul, Mother Dairy and others are stationed inside the campus to cater to the needs of students studying late night.

hostel_info:
The University takes exceptional care of students who are away from home. Galgotias University provides a hostel facility to its students. 

The hostels are offered for boys and girls. 

The hostels have a dining hall along with a professionally managed and hygienic mess. 

It also has facilities like housekeeping, wifi, elevator, clean drinking water etc.
campus_facilities:
A fully Wi-Fi campus.

Air-conditioned classrooms with audio-visual and multimedia facilities.

State-of-the art auditorium.

Well equipped Conference hall and Seminar hall.

Libraries with over 1,30,000 books, 30,000 e-books and 550+ national and international journals.

Data Centre where more than 20 servers store all databases related to students exams, accounts, website hosting with a bandwidth of 1Gbps.

24 hours Internet connectivity with 4 Mbps bandwidth.

Professionally managed mess and canteen.

Tie-up with nearby hospitals for OPD and emergencies.

Student activity centre for co-curricular and extra-curricular activities.
overview:
GALGOTIAS UNIVERSITY
Galgotias University, officially the Galgotias Campus Two, is a private university and the second regional campus of Galgotias Educational Institutions.
It is recognized by the University Grants Commission and was established in 2011.

Sharda University provides accommodation to students on a first-come-first-served basis. 

The campus is fully residential and extends an environment full of opportunities for personal growth. 

There are a total of 10 hostels,  five boys &  five girls in the campus.

Campus facilities-



Library-



The varsity has one central library and 8 council libraries. 

All the libraries are well stocked with books, journals, reports, magazines etc. for reference for students and faculty members. 

The libraries have digital resources for students and have wifi connectivity as well.



Auditorium-



Sharda University has four big auditoriums to promote the conduct of international, national and other University events such as conferences, workshops, seminars, meetings, placement programmes and cultural events. 





Both auditoriums are well-furnished, air-conditioned and equipped with modern projection and audio systems with access to the internet.



Banking & ATM-



Sharda University provides banking and postal services within the campus for the ease of students, faculty and staff members.



Apart from this, the University also has a 24 hours ATM facility for round the clock cash withdrawal.





Canteen & restaurant-



There are 10 cafeterias located around the campus of the university. 

Along with the cafeterias, the campus also has many mini refreshment joints and vending machines. 

Amul Milk Parlour, Cafe Coffee Day, Urban Thali, Lego House, Nestle etc are present on campus.



Restaurant- The university has a casual dining restaurant that serves fast food. It is known for its stylish presentation. Tasty and hygienic food is served in the restaurant.



WiFi-



Sharda University's campus has a seamless Wi-Fi network with multiple ISPs which allow the students to connect to the internet anytime, anywhere. 



Extra Curricular Activities -



The student activity centre at Sharda University offers students a platform to demonstrate their skills and talents and contribute to the general development of the students. It has more than 20 clubs that are broadly categorised as Cultural, Sports, and Technical Societies. Just a handful of each school's extracurricular activities include photography, radio, drama, football, basketball, cricket, and technical club. 







In addition, Sharda University has teamed up with SPIC MACAY (Society for Promotion of Indian Classical Music and Culture Amongst Youth) to give its students and employees the chance to not only take part in top-notch cultural events held on campus, but also to discover and develop their own cultural skills. A nonprofit organisation called SPIC MACAY sponsors several performances by well-known artists to promote Indian traditional arts.The SPIC MACAY chapter offers a sense of leisure in the midst of the hectic academic schedule and aids in improving one's awareness of Indian culture.

There are double and triple sharing rooms with beds, study table, chair, and almirah are provided for every student. Wi-Fi in the hostel premises, Uninterrupted water supply, Hygienic and fresh filtered drinking water with the availability of cold drinking water in summers, Geysers in winters, Power backup, Entertainment facilities like T.V., News Paper, Indoor Games, First aid facility, 24-hour security along with a homely mess adds comfort to the students who opt for the hostel.



Campus facilities-



Central Library-



The Central Library of G L Bajaj is user-focused, innovative, and excellence driven. 

Central Library manages knowledge both in print and digital formats, ensures seamless discovery and access to these scholarly resources, and provides faculty, students, and staff with professional support to find, evaluate, manage, and use such resources.





Central Library provides fully air-conditioned & Wi-Fi enabled world-class learning environment.



Auditorium-



The Institute has a state-of-the-art, fully air-conditioned auditorium with a seating capacity of 350 people, huge amphitheatre and numerous conference rooms.





Classrooms-

To complement traditional methods of teaching, the use of advanced aids like LCD Projectors, Public Address Systems and various other on-line can be accessed if required.



Sports Facilities-



Spending quality time is never a problem in the Institute. Sports facilities are provided for futsal, Table Tennis, Cricket, Football, Badminton, Basketball, and Volleyball.

Our college, the G. L. Bajaj Institute of Management & Technology, Greater Noida, which is rolling out the "On November 20 and 21, 2018, the Google Team hosted the Mobile Developer Fest at our facilities. It is a Google event that raises participants' awareness of the various Google Products, courses, developer stories, and projects taking on in India. Google performs live on Day 1 "3 hours of hands-on experience with Android CodeLabs The execution of such a programme was the college's major accomplishment in demonstrating leadership by taking the initiative to empower or promote new technologies alongside the Google Team in addition to their curriculum, which greatly increases student motivation for their future careers.





DONATION DRIVE



An initiative to enhance education in the lives of underprivileged children. G. L. Bajaj The Mechanical Engineering Department organised a donation campaign on March 9 under the auspices of ICC GL Bajaj.

The impoverished children at a school in Alpha One received stationery as part of the School Bag programme.

Student Hostels-



GLA University provides well-furnished hostel facilities to its outstation candidates. 

The campus hostels are surrounded by lush green lawns and playing fields. 

The separate facilities for boys and girls, caring wardens and a tight security ensures a pleasant stay allowing you to focus on your academics.

The hostels have complete power backup. Facilities for indoor games like TT, carom, chess, Television etc. are also available.



There are 15 boys hostel and 4 girls hostel in the campus.



Campus facilities-



Library-



GLA’s Central Library has a rich collection of electronic databases, journals and books in relevant disciplines. 

The entire library collection including books can be searched through the OPAC. 



Internet access facility is available in the library, 25 PCs have been installed in the Cyber Library for using internet and eresources. 



Auditorium-



University has an Auditorium with 2500 Seating Capacity.





Health care centre-



The main dispensary is now a six-roomed unit with attached toilets. 

There are eight Semi-Fowler beds for patients requiring in-patient care and the OP facility with basic furniture including examination couches. 



A more basic facility caters to the health-care needs of girls in the Ladies Hostel.



WiFi-



Wireless network with 50 access points is also enabled in the academic block, library, and classrooms.



Extra Curricular Activities-



Yantriki Society







The Yantriki organisation, which is connected to the mechanical engineering department, is in charge of planning workshops, inviting guest lecturers, and running extracurricular and cultural events. It is essential to the planning of cultural events like Panache, Dandiya Nights, and the celebration of Children's Day. In addition, members of the society frequently assist others in planning events like Fresher's and Farewell Parties, among others.



Skill Club



The Mechanical Engineering department at GLA University in Mathura oversees the skill club. The event is jointly organised by Skill Club and Agra's MSME-Technology Development Center (PPDC). The club's goal is to improve students' technical abilities by teaching them the latest equipment, software, and technologies that are being used in the business today with the assistance of professionals in the related sectors. The club does this by hosting a variety of workshops, events, software training sessions, industrial trips, etc. The club thinks that practical knowledge is just as vital as theoretical knowledge, and that having hands-on experience enhances learning by making students more self-assured and skilled.



SAE GLAU





In 1905, the Society of Automotive Engineering, or SAE, was founded. Henry Ford and Andrew Ricker came up with the idea. The main reason SAE was founded was to bring together the dispersed automotive engineers working across US states under one banner. However, SAE's role soon broadened and it developed into a vital tool for the industry to communicate engineering advancements.



The Association of Automotive Engineers (SAE), an engineering and scientific society that is registered as non-profit, is committed to promoting mobility technology to better meet human requirements. It outlines the protocols that mechanical engineers should follow. Automotive, aerospace, and commercial vehicle industries are highlighted by SAE.





Drishti Photography Club







Drishti is acknowledged as the GLA University's official photography club. This group aims to cover college festivals, annual cultural programmes, workshops, practise sessions, and other activities. The progression from a little camera to a full-featured DSLR camera has been amazing. Drishti wants to develop talent and raise the bar for photography. It gives the campus's enthusiastic and youthful photographers a place to learn and develop. By the Grace of God Drishti, the Photography club began its adventure on February 14, 2015, with a vision and objective to discover the innate abilities of the future generation and foster a vibrant atmosphere on campus.





Placement-



Till now, during the GLA University placements 2022, the participating recruiters offered a total of 1500 jobs to students. 

The highest salary package offered stood at INR 32 LPA. 

More highlights from GLA University placements 2022 are tabulated below:

hostel_info:
There are 20 campus hostels; 14 for boys and 6 for girls. 
AMU has the best residential facilities among government universities in India.
Almost all the services and facilities are provided to the resident students. Though, students say the food at the dining is not much better (coz it is not the best though), 
If you count other facilities, you will be awestruck. Students have facilities like a common room, badminton court, football ground, basketball court, billiards room and many more fun centres for dynamic development.
Many halls comprise their own gym inside the hall for their resident students.
campus_facilities:
Library:
AMU has the second biggest library in Asia with a whopping collection of over 11.5 lakh books and documents. 

The library also has about 10000 periodicals from various categories such as Persian, Hindi, Urdu and Arabic. The library at AMU Aligarh has a well-equipped computer lab.

Sports:
Aligarh Muslim University has 15 clubs dedicated to sports and the cricket club is one of the oldest established in 1878. Some of the important clubs which are associated with the games community are tennis club, football club, gymkhana club, table tennis club, swimming club, athletic club and even a hiking and mountaineering club.
overview:
AMU- ALIGARH MUSLIM UNIVERSITY
Aligarh Muslim University is a public central university in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh, India, which was originally established by Sir Syed Ahmad Khan as the Muhammadan Anglo-Oriental College in 1875.
Muhammadan Anglo-Oriental College became Aligarh Muslim University in 1920, following the Aligarh Muslim University Act.

full_content:
AMU- ALIGARH MUSLIM UNIVERSITY 

                                                                                 



Aligarh Muslim University is a public central university in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh, India, which was originally established by Sir Syed Ahmad Khan as the Muhammadan Anglo-Oriental College in 1875. 





Muhammadan Anglo-Oriental College became Aligarh Muslim University in 1920, following the Aligarh Muslim University Act. 





Important information regarding AMU-



Location-



Address- Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh 202001



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/RmBCZGMbsEgCS9uU6







Campus size- 155 acres



Reaching AM University-



Aligarh Muslim University, Aligarh is situated in the middle of Doab ,the land between the Ganga and Yamuna rivers, at a distance of 130 km Southeast of Delhi on the Delhi-Howrah or Delhi-Guwahati rail route and the Grand Trunk Road. 



You can go to AMU by Roadways or Railways or Airways. It depends on your location from AMU. By railways you have to go to Aligarh Railway Station. 



The University campus is 2 kms away from the Aligarh Railway Station.By flight you have to go to IGI Airport,New Delhi which is the nearest Airport. From there you can go to AMU by roadways or railways.

Student Hostels-



There are 20 campus hostels; 14 for boys and 6 for girls. 

AMU has the best residential facilities among government universities in India.

Almost all the services and facilities are provided to the resident students. Though, students say the food at the dining is not much better (coz it is not the best though), 

If you count other facilities, you will be awestruck. Students have facilities like a common room, badminton court, football ground, basketball court, billiards room and many more fun centres for dynamic development.

Many halls comprise their own gym inside the hall for their resident students.



Girls hostel-



Begum Azizun Nisa Hall

Campus facilities-



Library-



AMU has the second biggest library in Asia with a whopping collection of over 11.5 lakh books and documents. 









The library also has about 10000 periodicals from various categories such as Persian, Hindi, Urdu and Arabic. The library at AMU Aligarh has a well-equipped computer lab.



Guest house-



The institute campus has its own guest house to provide accommodation to their guests and visitors.











Sports activities-



Aligarh Muslim University has 15 clubs dedicated to sports and the cricket club is one of the oldest established in 1878. Some of the important clubs which are associated with the games community are tennis club, football club, gymkhana club, table tennis club, swimming club, athletic club and even a hiking and mountaineering club.









Lands and garden-



The land and gardens are for promoting greenery as well as vegetation all over the University for a green environment and they are responsible for production of crops and fruits and maintaining them for internal purposes as well as aesthetics.





Health services-



AMU medical facility has been catering to the Medical and health needs of more than 30000 students and staff as well as faculty.







It is responsible for providing emergency and diagnostic facilities along with pharmaceutical facilities added. 



Extra Curricular Activities-



There are various clubs in AMU which provide a lot of opportunities. For your convenience, we’ve listed them below:





University Film Club - The University Film Club was founded in 1974 at the instigation of a few enthusiastic faculty members who wanted to foster cinematic culture among college students and foster an environment where "prose and poetry in motion" would serve as a major inspiration for artistic and intellectual achievement.



AMU Roboclub - AMURoboclub is a student organisation that meets the needs of electronics hobbyists and enthusiasts by fostering a culture that is focused on implementation and innovation. AMU Roboclub is a thing of wonder, run under the capable direction and control of faculty advisers from several engineering disciplines.



Red Ribbon Club - Increase youth understanding of HIV/AIDS, STIs, sexuality, and other associated issues by educating them with accurate, succinct, and sufficient information (thus eliminate myths and misconceptions). Give young people, especially female students, the ability to recognise and comprehend instances of exploitation and abuse.



SAE ZHCET Collegiate Club - A student chapter of SAE-INDIA is called SAE-ZHCET Collegiate Club. It was established in 2012 by third-year mechanical engineering students. Its founding at ZHCET served to inspire college students to pursue careers in the automotive industry and its extensive engineering field. There are currently more than 100 ZHCET students actively engaging in the club's workshops, lectures, and industrial visits.







Riding Club - The Aligarh Muslim University Riding Club rose to prominence as a distinctive aspect of the school's pride and accomplishments. The Riding Club is well recognised for its strict military discipline and extensive traditions. In all aspects of discipline and efficient operation, the specific authority of the club captain has always been preserved.

full_content:
INDIAN INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, ALLAHABAD 

                                                            

Indian Institute of Information Technology, Allahabad (IIIT-Allahabad) is a public university located in Uttar Pradesh. 





It is one of the nineteen Indian Institutes of Information Technology listed by the Ministry of Education (India).



Important information regarding IIIT Allahabad-



Location-



Address-

Indian Institute Of Information Technology Road Devghat, Jhalwa, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh 211015



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/LvVwQoZ3SLz7XQsi8







Campus size-approximately 3820 sq.m



Reaching Amity University-

Allahabad City is well connected with Rail, Road and Air Links from across the country. Being an important

pilgrimage centre as well as educational and legal hub, it has a prime place in the history of India from times

immemorial.



AIR ROUTE-  The nearest airport is the Bamrauli (Allahabad) Airport which is 12 kms. from Allahabad City and 6 Kms from the venue (IIITA) and it is open for domestic flights. 



TRAIN ROUTE- Allahabad has a major rail junction, the Allahabad Junction and another station called Prayag. Being

situated on the main line of the Indian railways, there are direct trains for Allahabad from most of the major Indian cities.

Student Hostels-



Boys Hostel-



The Boys Hostel of IIIT-Allahabad Campus consists of BH1, BH2, BH3, BH4 and BH5 situated across the road from the main campus.







Recreational facilities include provision for sports such as Volleyball, Badminton, Table tennis etcetera and are complemented with gymnasium, common TV rooms. 







These facilities provide sufficient avenues for students to relax during the demanding academic activities.



Girls Hostel-



IIIT Allahabad also provides hostel facilities with a homely environment to about 500 girl's student of the institute. It consists of three hostels GH1, GH2, GH3 constituting separate air conditioned mess and gym facilities with a 24hrs guidance of caretakers.





Further, the students can access the facility of the basketball court, badminton court in front of the Girls Hostel-1.

Night canteens within the boys and girls hostel premises facilitate the dietary requirements of the students after the normal dining hours. 



Campus facilities-



Library-



The IIIT-A library is stocked with books that cater to the student's academic and research requirements. 

Audio and multimedia versions of some course modele are also available.







Gymkhana-



Gymkhana is a student body for all of the student activities round the year. 

It's a platform which enables the students to enhance their talent in the fields other than studies and let them develop their overall personality.





Medical facilities-



The institute has its own health centre with qualified doctors on its rolls. 

In addition to that IIIT-A has its tie up with two multispeciality hospitals in Allahabad itself with facilities of indoor treatment facility.





Sports facilities-



The IIITA Sports facilities bring to you the spirit of life, the spirit of competition, the spirit to win, the spirit to participate and ultimately prove the one within you.



.







Labs-



There are several Labs in IIIT-A that cater to the various needs of the students. 

These labs are equipped with the latest hi-tech gadgets and state of the art equipment.



Extra Curricular Activities -



VIRTUOSI - The IIITA music club serves as a showcase for the school's musical abilities. The club has been successful in putting on fantastic performances and also been beneficial in allowing the student to catch the music bug, in addition to having a college band. Throughout the year, the group goes to a number of musicals and concerts.







USHMA - The ushma of the dance club is represented by synergy of thinking, symphony of movement, artistic expression, and a sense of idyllic beauty. It is one of IIIT-most A's active clubs. It oversees dance performances at Effervescence and other club events beginning with first-year students. The club has showcased a variety of dance styles.







RANGTARANGINI - The dramatics club at IIIT, RangTarangani is in charge of setting up acting and scriptwriting workshops as well as arranging theatre competitions where budding talent can be displayed. Excellent performances in both Hindi and English have been staged by the club on a number of occasions.







SPIRIT - You can experience the energy of life, competition, winning, participation, and ultimately proving the one inside of you thanks to the IIITA Sports Club. The most exciting sporting activities of IIITA will be presented to you because of our passion, daring, and energy. The most fascinating evening festival is when games like Gully Cricket and Street Football are played.







SARASVA - It organises extempores, debates, and other literary contests. Additionally, it is in charge of producing the on-campus publications IMHO (in English) and Swacchanda (in Hindi). The best spot to pause and show off your ability to appreciate artistic beauty is in SARASVA.







THUNDERBOLT - The club has been quite effective in organising lights, audio equipment, and visual recording of many events held at IIITA, and the institute is happy to have their services. This club as a whole handles all the audio and lighting for collegiate events. Also invited are students.







STAMBH - The Indian Institute of Information Technology in Allahabad refers to Stambh as the cornerstone of all extracurricular activities. Every year, the club has put its best effort into helping the student fraternity reach its full potential. It oversees all campus events, including the annual Effervescence festival.







GEEKHAVEN - Half of the events at our festivals wouldn't be possible without our fantastic Technical Club. The Technical Club would undoubtedly be Batman, the watchful protector and silent defender watching out for all of us, in keeping with our theme of Marvel superheroes.

full_content:
JAYPEE INSTITUTE OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY

                            



Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, Noida was established in the year 2001 and has been declared as a "Deemed to be University" under Section 3 of UGC Act 1956 in the year 2004.





JIIT has been constantly ranked amongst the top engineering Institutes in Delhi NCR. Recently it has been ranked among top Engineering Institutes in India by Edu Rand 2014 Engineering College Rankings.



Important information regarding JIIT-



Location-



Address-

A 10, A Block, Block A, Industrial Area, Sector 62, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201309



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/gJiGQD6qfMxjhm479





Campus size- 16 acres



Reaching JIIT-

Noida Electronic City Metro Station is the nearest metro from JIIT noida .it is in front of Gate Number 3 of JIIT sector 62

The campus presently has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Number of seats in various hostels are as follows:

All the hostel rooms are provided with LAN/Wi-Fi connectivity with 24 hours internet through the main server of the academic block.

Reading rooms and additional sports facilities like table-tennis rooms, chess and carrom rooms. 

The hostel is also connected with outdoor sports centres for lawn-tennis, basket-ball, volley-ball and badminton. 

The hostels are equipped with generators in order to provide 24 hour’s electricity supply, water heaters, water freezers etc.



Campus facilities-



Learning resources centre-



The Learning Resource Centre at JIIT Noida is an excellent repository of learning resources. 

It is situated in the basement of ABB-III, which can accommodate about 700 users at a time. 

It has more than 73 computer nodes with high speed Internet & Intranet connectivity. 



It is fully integrated with the latest barcode technology with EM Security System and international standard library management open source.

The LRC possesses a very rich collection of books, Journals, e-resources, bound journals and other reading material.



Medical-



There is a well equipped dispensary with 24 x 7 doctors  with ambulance service. 

There is also a tie-up with a number of corporate hospitals for specialised treatment at subsidised rates.





Sports- 



Outdoor- There is provision for playing the following outdoor sports.

 Basketball, Lawn Tennis, Volleyball, Football, Cricket







Indoor

 Swimming Pool (Boys) Swimming Pool with adequate number of showers, change rooms, water filtration and chlorination facilities.





 Badminton Three badminton courts are available in the air conditioned multipurpose hall with synthetic flooring.

Table Tennis 4 TT tables are installed in the air conditioned multipurpose hall with synthetic flooring.

Squash courts Two air conditioned squash courts with glass back under construction Carrom & Chess Available.





Boys Gym Under construction 

Girls Gym Under construction



Banking-



The University has tied up with ICICI Bank Ltd. for opening the savings account.

Two ATM machines are installed by ICICI Bank at Security Gate No. 3 & One ATM machine is installed by Axis Bank at Sector 128.











Extra Curricular Activities -



Youth is a great time that only comes around once! By the time we appreciate this gift, it will be time for us to advance to the next level of manhood. It arrives, sees, and departs. There are two types of people: those who do not appreciate youth and miss out on its glory and charm, and those who do, who wake up early, put their socks on, and get ready for the big game!



The second category is J.I.I.T. Youth Club. Youth Brigade is what it stands for. It is deserving of the hall of fame. It makes promises, follows through on them, and fulfils them. A breath of fresh air, a reprieve from routine tasks, and a life where everyone is valued and welcomed are all provided by JIIT's JYC!







JYC is the only student body at the college that supports the holistic development of young people and works to create a loving atmosphere, a secure setting, and a ground for celebrations. The club strives to maintain high levels of passion and team cohesion through events, fests, parties, and hikes.







JYC offers everything, whether it be the hues of the cultural club or the discussion of the literary centre, whether it be the robotics mechanics or technical club skills. These extracurricular activities offer a chance to boost confidence, promote teamwork, and give pupils a strong sense of accomplishment and belongingness aside from acting as a break from rigorous academic loads.

hostel_info:
well-managed hostel located in the tranquil environs of Dayalbagh, run on a non-profitable basis by a charitable society.

Facilities for indoor and outdoor games, gymnasium,  reading room, and internet access.

An in-house co-operative mess that provides quality food.

Solar Power and Solar Cooking Facilities in the Hostels.
campus_facilities:
Library:
The Faculty Library has about 28000 book titles. 
The Library subscribes to several National / International Journals.
The Library also provides access to INFLIBNET through an  Institute–wide fibre optic LAN with access to more than 1000 e-journals.

Other facilities available in the library include reprographic and reference services.
The book-bank provides most of the textbooks to the students in the Faculty.
In addition, about 2 lakh books are available in other faculty libraries, as well as the Central Library, to students of the Faculty of Engineering.

Sports:
DEI provides large playgrounds for outdoor games like hockey, football, cricket, lawn tennis, basketball, athletics, volleyball, kho-kho, etc. The DEI sports facility also provides indoor games like table tennis, badminton, chess, carrom, etc.

full_content:
FACULTY OF ENGINEERING, DAYALBAGH EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTE (DEI)

                            

          

Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute, which is widely recognized as one of the most prestigious engineering institutions of India.





The Faculty has held aloft the beacon of knowledge, research and education in the field of engineering throughout its existence.



Important information regarding DEI -



Location-



Address-

Dayal Bagh Rd, DayalBagh, Agra, Uttar Pradesh 282005



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/Z9SNXXQDUDqi5pbw6







Campus size- 75 acres



Reaching DEI-

Nearest Railway Stations to DIE is (BFP)Bilochpura Agra. Which is 2.98 kms away from the campus.





Engineering courses details offered by DEI-



Course

Eligibility

Streams Offered in the course

B.Tech

10+2 + JEE Main

Civil Engineering



Electrical Engineering



Footwear Technology



Mechanical Engineering



Fee structure-



B.Tech

Total fees- ₹ 51,300



Year

Tuition Fees



12,825



12,825



12,825



12,825



Student Hostels-



well-managed hostel located in the tranquil environs of Dayalbagh, run on a non-profitable basis by a charitable society.

Facilities for indoor and outdoor games, gymnasium,  reading room, and internet access.

An in-house co-operative mess that provides quality food.

Solar Power and Solar Cooking Facilities in the Hostels.







Campus facilities-



Library and Book-bank:



The Faculty Library has about 28000 book titles. 

The Library subscribes to several National / International Journals.

The Library also provides access to INFLIBNET through an  Institute–wide fibre optic LAN with access to more than 1000 e-journals.







Other facilities available in the library include reprographic and reference services.

The book-bank provides most of the textbooks to the students in the Faculty.

In addition, about 2 lakh books are available in other faculty libraries, as well as the Central Library, to students of the Faculty of Engineering.



E-classrooms:



State-of-the-art e-classrooms have been set up in the faculty to offer quality technical education in distance mode.



Sports-



DEI provides large playgrounds for outdoor games like hockey, football, cricket, lawn tennis, basketball, athletics, volleyball, kho-kho, etc. The DEI sports facility also provides indoor games like table tennis, badminton, chess, carrom, etc.



Auditorium-



DEI Agra auditorium is spread over an area of 250 square metres. DEI auditorium facility has a large hall with a seating capacity of 250 people. 





Extra Curricular Activities -



Aside from a required credit-based review for all students, the following co-curricular and extracurricular events are held regularly. Every student must take a three-credit course on CCA as part of their required coursework each year.







Students are assessed based on their participation in extracurricular activities, athletic prowess, intellectual prowess, cultural prowess, and participation in District, Regional, State, National, and International level competitions. In the past, our students have excelled in several Technical Events as well as the National Level Youth Parliament and International Level Youth Festival. The following events are regularly held at the Institute and/or include students from other institutions.



• NSS Camps and Cleanliness Drives throughout the year

• Special Annual Winter Camp

• Sports, Cultural, Literary Activities

• NCC

• Annual Intra-Faculty and Inter-Faculty Cultural and Sports Competitions

• Inter-University Youth Festivals

• Model Parliament

• Bi-monthly DEI News

• Annual DEI Magazine

• Student technical Newsletter

• Wall magazines

• Yoga and Karate Classes for girls

• Inter-University English Drama Festival

• Inter-University Hindi Drama Festival

• Celebration of National Days

• Open day (31st January)

• Founder’s Day (20th December)

• Bhakti Sangeet

• Yoga Day

• Science Day

• Engineers Day

• Army Flag Day

• Communal Harmony Day

• Value Day (on Deepavali)

• Student Systems Conference

• Sci-Hi



   



Placement Statistics -

RAJIV GANDHI INSTITUTE OF PETROLEUM TECHNOLOGY 

                         



The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (MoPNG), Government of India, set up the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology.



 

The Institute has been accorded the eminence of being an Institution of National Importance along the lines of the Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs). 



Important information regarding RGIPT



Location-



Address-

Mubarakpur Mugatiya, Uttar Pradesh 229305



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/MvtqyLbGWy75gjob6





Campus size- 125 acres





Reaching RGIPT-

Student Hostels-



The Student Hostels of the Institute provide comfortable accommodation and are located close to the administrative and academic area. It has several sports and recreational facilities as well.









The major facilities available in the Hostels are:



Rooms are designed to provide adequate moving space and proper ventilation.

Rooms have Bed, Study Table, Chair, Partitioned Almirah, Fan, Fluorescent Tube

Equipped with RO Water Purifier and Geysers

Round the clock power back up facility

Round the clock Wi-Fi and LAN internet connectivity



Campus facilities-



Central Library-



The Central Library of the Institute is located on the first floor of the Administrative Building. 

It is centrally air-conditioned and equipped with all facilities, which are essential for readers. 

The library has a rich collection of books. 

Currently, more than 8000 books covering engineering, sciences, humanities and social sciences are available in the library. 







Gymnasium-



To keep both body and mind fit to undertake the challenges of life, RGIPT has made all provisions for its students through sports, fitness, recreation, gym and health club, yoga etc. 

Institute provides a state-of-the-art gymnasium, fully-equipped with the latest equipment within the campus. Instructors and trainers are also available to train the students.









Sports-



The infrastructure has been designed with good facilities for sports as well as recreational activities. Institute has top sports facilities including the following:

Cricket Ground



Football Grounds

BasketBall Courts



Badminton Courts

Volleyball Courts

Kabaddi Courts

Kho-kho Court

Pool Table



Table Tennis

Chess & Carrom Board

Table tennis



Guest house-



The institute also provides a guest house facility for their guests and visitors.









Classroom-



The classrooms are wide and have good sitting capacity. The classroom also has WiFi.





Extra Curricular Activities - 



Social Service Club -



RGIPT's social club, "ARPAN," was established in 2009. The group changed gradually over the years, taking baby steps toward becoming a tool for social change. Hundreds of passionate volunteers who care enough to think they can improve the world make up ARPAN today. ARPAN is not merely a social club; it also works to better the lives of those who are less fortunate.







Children's smiles are pure expressions of satisfaction and joy. This has motivated ARPAN to host all of the holidays for these kids. A few examples of what brings ARPAN and young children closer and makes these festivals special are the glow on their faces reflecting the light of the Diya on Diwali, the innocent joy of chasing the colourful kites on Makar-Sankranti, and the faces beaming with patriotism while singing the national anthem on Independence Day.





Films and Media Club -



This club's sole objective is to help students improve their abilities in the many fields of film, photography, videography, animation, and other media technology.

a totally separate setup for the photography and videography coverage of the many events and festivals that are hosted by various organisations and societies in the campus. This will foster development.







The creation of a club will aid the students in maintaining their focus and motivation while assisting them in relieving stress from their routine and tedious schedule.

Increasing the college's presence on social media, which will draw in a younger generation of students and employees, is the most crucial area where the club is thought to have an impact. In the modern digital age, brand creation is crucial.

full_content:
MAHARAJA AGRASEN INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY 

                                    



Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology was established in 1999 by Maharaja Agrasen Technical Education Society promoted by a group of well known Industrialists, Businessman, Professionals and Philanthropists with an aim to promote quality education in the field of Technology and Management.







Since then, MAIT has grown from strength to strength to emerge as one of the top technical institutes among the private Institutes and has been constantly ranked amongst the top engineering Institutes by DATAQUEST.



Important information regarding MAIT-



Location-



Address-

Plot No 1 Rohini, Plot No 1, CH Bhim Singh Nambardar Marg, Sector 22, PSP Area, Delhi, 110086



Campus map link-

https://maps.app.goo.gl/Y7zyJcuqtJopcUv88



Campus size-10 acres







Reaching MAIT-

The nearest metro station to Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology, ROHINI in Delhi is a 10 min walk away.



Courses offered by MAIT-

Student Hostels-



The Institute maintains Boy’s Hostel having four Blocks on campus. Hostel has over 40 single seater, 65 double seater and 7 four seater rooms. 



Each room is equipped with basic furniture like cot, pillow, chair, table, and cupboard, tube light and fan. 





Each of the hostels provides mess facilities for the residents; mess is managed under the overall supervision of hostel wardens. 

The common room, gymnasium and sports facilities are also available for residents.



Campus facilities-



Library-



MAIT Delhi facilities and infrastructure include a library on the campus. The institute has a well-equipped library with four floors and seating for about 350 pupils. 

The library has a large collection of books addressing the course curriculum, magazines, journals, and reading material outside of the curriculum, as well as access to the digital library. 





All four floors of the library are equipped with Wi-Fi, allowing students to access online study materials.



Sports-



Annually, a number of indoor and outdoor events, such as a sports meet and a volleyball competition, are held to engage students. 















The campus boasts its own basketball, tennis, and volleyball courts, as well as indoor games such as table tennis.



Cafeteria-



MAIT Delhi facilities and infrastructure include a well-equipped cafeteria. 





The main cafeteria has a seating capacity of around 100 people and it provides a variety of foods and mini-lunch packs.



Medical center-



To ensure students' entire well-being, the college provides first aid medical facilities and a full-time doctor on campus during the day. 



Wifi-



The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is W-Fi connectivity in the campus premises for students and staff members.



Extracurricular activity-



National Service Scheme (NSS): 

A written exam is also held, and students are rated based on their aptitude for the NSS, which is also covered in the GGSIPU curriculum. The following list of activities that the institute organises for its students. The entire three-day event was planned by the kids.



Program for Student Awareness:

Students that participate in the students awareness programme must take a written exam that covers the project-making process, NSS's symbol, goals and objectives, motto, and history.





ECO CLUB MAIT



The MAIT ECO group is in charge of overseeing campus green initiatives, including planting trees and medicinal plants as well as trash collection.

full_content:
A I I M S

                      (ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES)

                             

The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, or AIIMS, is an autonomous consortium of public medical colleges in India that aims to provide high-quality medical education to students from all across the country.



            



AIIMS institutions in India are regarded as the country's leading and top medical institutes, and every medical student's aspiration.



Every year, thousands of people enrol for the AIIMS MBBS exam in order to pursue their ambition of studying at one of India's AIIMS colleges.



There are now 15 AIIMS in India, with another eight under construction.



List of AIIMS Colleges in India- 





S.No.

          Name

Year of Establishment

   1.

AIIMS Delhi

1956

   2.

AIIMS Bhopal

2012

   3.

AIIMS Bhubaneswar

2012

   4.

AIIMS Jodhpur

2012

   5.

AIIMS Patna

2012

   6.

AIIMS Raipur

2012

   7.

AIIMS Rishikesh

2012

   8.

AIIMS RaeBareli

2012

   9.

AIIMS Nagpur 

2018

   10.

AIIMS Mangalagiri

2018

   11.

AIIMS Gorakhpur

2019

   12.

AIIMS Bibinagar 

2019

   13.

AIIMS Bathinda

2019

   14.

AIIMS Kalyani

2019

   15.

AIIMS Deogarh

2019

   16. 

AIIMS Guwahati

2020



Apart from the 16 existing AIIMS Colleges in India, the government plans to establish eight more AIIMS institutes in the country, as follows:



AIIMS Madurai (Tamil Nadu)

AIIMS Awantipora  (J&K, Kashmir Region)

AIIMS Rewari (Haryana)

AIIMS Darbhanga (Bihar)

AIIMS Changsari (Assam)

AIIMS Vijaypur (Jammu and Kashmir)

AIIMS Bilaspur (Himachal Pradesh)

AIIMS Rajkot ( Gujrat) 



Do you also want to enrol in AIIMS?  

But how can we join various courses offered by AIIMS?



Students can enrol in a variety of courses at the All India Institute Of Medical Science.

MBBS, BSC nursing, paramedical courses, B.Sc. (Hons), PG courses such as MD, MS, MDS, DM, M.Ch, M.Sc, M.Biotech, and PhD.



MBBS is by far the most popular course at AIIMS. In addition, the cost of an MBBS education at AIIMS is relatively low. As a result, it is a good chance for kids from disadvantaged backgrounds.



In order to be admitted to the MBBS program-



AIIMS offers a 5-year, 6-month MBBS programme, as well as a year-long internship.



The NEET-UG entrance examination is used to determine admission to the AIIMS MBBS programme, which is followed by counselling.



Eligibility criteria- 



Candidates must have finished a recognised Board's 10+2 programme with a 60 percent grade in Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English (as a compulsory subject).



The candidate must be at least 17 years old as of December 31st of the admission year.



How can we apply?



Applicants must fill out the NEET application form on the NTA's website.

Students must pay the required non-refundable fees in order to complete the enrollment process.

Students must fill out all personal and fee information (through debit/credit card or Bank Challan) during this process.



In order to enrol in undergraduate courses (B.Sc, B.Sc. nursing and paramedical courses)



B.Sc Nursing & Paramedical is available at AIIMS in a variety of specialisations.

The length of the programme is determined on the programme type chosen.

Every year, admissions application forms are made available online.

Candidates can apply for admission to their preferred programme by visiting the AIIMS official website.



Course

Specialisation

B.Sc (Hons.)

Nursing, Medical Technology in Radiography

B.Optom

-

B.Sc (Post Basic)

Nursing



 Eligibility Criteria:



Candidates must have completed 12th grade under the 10+2 scheme/ Senior School Certificate Examination or Intermediate Science or an equivalent examination from a recognised university with English, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, or Mathematics as subjects with a minimum aggregate of 55 percent.



The candidate must be at least 17 years old as of December 31st of the admission year.



Selection criteria-



Candidates for UG courses at AIIMS Delhi must have taken an admission exam and received a valid score, followed by university-led counselling.



Candidates will be chosen for the Personal Interview based on their written exam results.



In order to get admitted to a postgraduate programme (MD, MS, MDS, DM, M.Ch, M.Sc & M.Biotech)-



At the Postgraduate level, AIIMS Delhi offers MD, MS, MDS, DM, M.Ch, M.Sc, and M.Biotech with several specialisations in Medicine, Dentistry, Nursing, Biotechnology, and Paramedical Sciences.



After graduating MBBS, students can apply for admission to the DM and M.Ch programmes at the institute.



Both of these courses are six years long.



Course

Specialisation

MD

Medicine, Hospital Administration

MS

Medicine

MDS

Nursing

M.Sc

Nursing, Medical Anatomy, Medical Biochemistry, Biophysics, Medical Pharmacology, Medical Physiology, Reproductive Biology and Clinical Embryology, Nuclear Medicine Technology and Cardiovascular Imaging, Endovascular Technologies

M.Biotech

Biotechnology



Eligibility Criteria:



Candidates must have completed one year of internship and have passed MBBS or BDS with 55 percent marks approved by the Medical Council of India in order to be admitted to MD, MS, MDS, DM, or M.Ch.



Candidates for M.Sc (Nursing) admission must have completed a B.Sc (Honours) Nursing/ B.Sc Nursing (Post-certificate)/ Post-Basic/ B.Sc Nursing (Four-year) from an Indian Nursing Council-accredited institution with a minimum of 60% marks.



Candidates must have passed MBBS/BDS with 55 percent marks, BVSc/B.Pharm/BPT/B.Sc with 60 percent marks, and M.Sc Biotechnology / Medical Anatomy / Medical Biochemistry / Biophysics / Medical Pharmacology / Medical Physiology with 60 percent marks in order to be admitted to M.Sc Biotechnology / Medical Anatomy / Medical Biochemistry / Biophysics / Medical Pharmacology / Medical Physiology



Selection Criteria:



Admission to MD, MS, MDS, DM, and M.Ch will be based on performance in AIIMS PG, followed by counselling.



Admission to the M.Sc programme at AIIMS Delhi will be based on performance in a computer-based test (CBT), followed by institute-led counselling.



In order to be admitted to a super-specialty programme-



Under its superspeciality programme, AIIMS offers the DM and M.Ch courses.

The courses are three years in length.

A Master's Degree is required for admission to these programmes, and the final selection will be made on the basis of an entrance examination.



Eligibility Criteria-



The candidate should have a master's or doctoral degree in the relevant field, if applicable.

The candidate must be under the age of 35 on July 1st of the admission year.



For taking admission in PhD-



A Doctorate in Philosophy in Medicine and Allied Sciences is offered by AIIMS Delhi.

The institute has 34 departments that provide Ph.D. programmes.



Course

Specialisation

Ph.D

Anatomy, Biochemistry, Biophysics, Biotechnology, C.C.M, Cardiac Biochemistry, Dental Surgery, Dermatology and Venerology, Emergency Medicine, Gastroenterology and HNU, Hematology, Lab Medicine, Lab Oncology, Medical Oncology, Medical Physics, Microbiology, Neurology, Neuro-Radiology, Neuro-Psychology, N.M.R, Nuclear Medicine, Ocular Biochemistry, Ocular Pharmacology, Ophthalmology (RPC), Pathology, Pediatrics, Pediatric Surgery, Pharmacology, Physiology, Psychiatry, Psychiatry (NDDTC), Reproductive Biology, Stem Cell, T.I.I.



Eligibility Criteria: 



Candidates who have obtained a 55 percent or above in MBBS/BDS or MD/MS/MDS/DM/M.Ch in the relevant disciplines from institutes approved by The Medical Council of India.



                     OR 



Candidates who have completed an M.sc. in Nursing with a grade point average of 55 percent or higher are eligible to apply to the AIIMS institute's Ph.D. programme in Nursing.



                                 OR 



Candidates with a non-medical background (M.Tech/BAMS/M.sc) must achieve a minimum of 60% on the previous qualifying examination.



In the recent two years, non-medical candidates must have taken any of the following National Entrance Exams: Joint CSIR-UGC NET, ICMR-JRF, ICMR-SRF, DBT-JRF, GATE, NBHM Screening test, and INSPIRE Fellowship.



Selection Criteria:



Admission in Ph.D. programme based on entrance exam conducted by the Institute.The exam is given in an online (CBT) format.

Library:
For students at this college, the library is said to be one of the most striking attractions.
Because it contains all of the necessary course-related books that are relevant and up-to-date.
All AIIMS teachers, residents, students, and staff have access to the library 24 hours a day, seven days a week for reading and consulting.

Sports:
AIIMS is not solely concerned with maintaining a disciplined curriculum in order for its pupils to achieve academic success.
It also offers exciting sporting opportunities.
Badminton is available. Football, basketball, and tennis courts are also available. There is also a swimming pool and a gym on the premises.

ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, NEW DELHI

                                           



The All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS Delhi) is one of India's most qualitative & honourable medical institutes.

An Act of Parliament designated it as a National Institution of Importance in 1956.

It has ranked first in the NIRF rankings for the past three years in the 'Medical' category.

This Institute has facilities of  teaching, research, and patient care & also this Institute offers various types of medical, paramedical courses at undergraduate and postgraduate level. 







Important information regarding AIIMS Delhi-



Location

Address-

Sri Aurobindo Marg, Ansari Nagar, Ansari Nagar East, New Delhi, Delhi 110029

 Campus map link-

     

  https://maps.app.goo.gl/fQyuZxW3CkDGjT8R8









Campus size- 330 acres







Reaching AIIMS Delhi-



The nearest railway station to Aiims Delhi is Hazrat Nizamuddin station. 



The nearest metro is just 100 metres away from the railway station. Check in the Yellow Line of Delhi Metro which is heading toward Huda City Centre Metro Station.

Campus facilities-



Library-



For students at this college, the library is said to be one of the most striking attractions.



Because it contains all of the necessary course-related books that are relevant and up-to-date.



All AIIMS teachers, residents, students, and staff have access to the library 24 hours a day, seven days a week for reading and consulting.













Sports facilities and Gymkhana-



AIIMS is not solely concerned with maintaining a disciplined curriculum in order for its pupils to achieve academic success.



It also offers exciting sporting opportunities.



Badminton is available. Football, basketball, and tennis courts are also available. There is also a swimming pool and a gym on the premises.











Mess and Cafeteria-



At AIIMS Delhi, there are seven messes. Four of the seven are private and attached to hostels, while the other three are open to the general public.



Only students enrolled at the institute are allowed to use the four hostel messes. No outsiders or visitors are permitted to enter the premises.



There are many additional facilities on campus where you can have a great experience. Furthermore, the prices of commodities at these businesses have been heavily discounted for students and others.

Snack Bar

Coffee Parlour (Nestle)

Coffee Kiosk

Juice Shop

Cafe House

Cooperative Canteen

Mother Dairy

Safal Store



 

         





Wi-fi-



Students and faculty members have free access to the internet for academic and research purposes.

They can access the facility at any time and from any location on campus.



Medical facilities-



The college offers a medical clinic on campus that provides free first-aid care to students and staff.

There are also qualified medical professionals in the medical clinic.

Student Hostels-



The hostel rooms have branded furnishings, such as beds, lamps, fans, curtains, and even doors and windows.

There are also contemporary restrooms and washrooms, as well as a playroom...



There are elevators, washing machines, an ironing room, and high-tech water purifiers as well as student coolers.



On the ground floor, there is also a vending machine where you may get anything at any time.



In some ways, the facilities are on par with those of any top university in the country.















Campus facilities



Central Library/ Learning resources centre-



The Central Library at AIIMS Nagpur offers its users an atmosphere in which they can expand their knowledge and abilities by using library materials and services that meet international standards.



E-learning is supported by the WIFI-enabled library complex. Additional infrastructural facilities in the library complex include a group study room, a mini conference room, and a computer facility with internet access.



Currently, students and facilities have access to 1500 (approximately) books covering all medical specialties. The Central Library is concentrating on acquiring digital library resources.









Mess & Canteen- 



Students on the temporary campus of GMC-Nagpur are eating at the GMC canteen.



The canteens are being built on the permanent MIHAN campus. Students will be able to use separate canteens for undergraduate and postgraduate students.



They will be on the ground level of a staff quarters building with a total building area of 652 square metres and 811 square metres, respectively.



Sports- 



As per the liking and desire of the students, AIIMS Nagpur provides various indoor and outdoor sports equipment such as cricket, lawn tennis, badminton, carom, chess, table tennis, and football.











Internship-



As per the Government of India rules, the interns of MBBS are entitled to a stipend of Rs 17, 900- ₹ 23,500 per month. 

All AIIMS do not provide the same stipend. It varies according to their respective states/Union Territory's rules.

overview:
ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, GORAKHPUR
The AIIMS in Gorakhpur is one of the new AIIMS established as part of the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare's Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojna (PMSSY) initiative.

ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, GORAKHPUR

                           



The AIIMS in Gorakhpur is one of the new AIIMS established as part of the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare's Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojna (PMSSY) initiative.



AIIMS Gorakhpur will offer undergraduate and postgraduate medical education in all departments of medicine and associated fields, as well as nursing and paramedical training, in order to bring together world-class educational facilities for staff training in all aspects of health care.

Central Mess-



The Mess will cater to both the boys and the girl's students. The Mess will provide students with clean and hygienic cuisine as well as comfy sitting.



Central Library-



The AIIMS Gorakhpur Central Library is being built to satisfy the diverse needs of the Institute's students, instructors, and staff.



The Library seeks to serve print and online issues of notable journals, books, and magazines, starting with a collection of around 600 references and textbooks on various themes.



For the readers' convenience, separate E-Library and reading sections have been planned.

Wi-Fi-



Students and faculty members have free access to the internet for academic and research purposes.



They are welcome to utilise the facility at any time and from any location on campus.



Internship-



As per the Government of India rules, the interns of MBBS are entitled to a stipend of Rs 17, 900- ₹ 23,500 per month. 



All AIIMS do not provide the same stipend. It varies according to their respective states/Union Territory's rules.

overview:
ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, KALYANI
On October 7, 2015, the Union Cabinet approved the All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Kalyani under the Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY).
AIIMS Kalyani is a National Institute with the mission of addressing imbalances at three levels: regional, specialty, and medical doctor-to-nurse-to-other-healthcare-professional ratio.
It aims to establish teaching patterns in undergraduate and postgraduate medical education in all fields so that all medical colleges and other affiliated institutions in India may display a high standard of medical education.

overview:
ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, GUWAHATI
In May 2017, the Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojna (PMSSY) created the All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) - Guwahati, an autonomous Institute of National Importance under the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare of the Government of India.
The Institute was established with the goal of redressing regional inequities in tertiary level healthcare and achieving self-sufficiency in graduate and postgraduate medical education. To exhibit a high standard of medical education to all medical colleges and other affiliated institutions in India, the Institute aspires to build model teaching patterns in undergraduate and postgraduate medical education in all of its branches.

full_content:
ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, GUWAHATI

                                    



In May 2017, the Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojna (PMSSY) created the All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) - Guwahati, an autonomous Institute of National Importance under the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare of the Government of India.



The Institute was established with the goal of redressing regional inequities in tertiary level healthcare and achieving self-sufficiency in graduate and postgraduate medical education. To exhibit a high standard of medical education to all medical colleges and other affiliated institutions in India, the Institute aspires to build model teaching patterns in undergraduate and postgraduate medical education in all of its branches.

overview:
ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, DEOGARH
AIIMS Deoghar (All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar) is a public medical school and hospital in Deoghar, Jharkhand, India, and one of the All India Institutes of Medical Sciences (AIIMSs). It is one of six AIIMS that began operations in the year 2019.
The main goal is to create a centre of excellence in medical education, training, health care, and research that is infused with scientific culture, compassion for the sick, and a desire to help those who are underserved.

hostel_info:
The campus of the All India Institute of Medical Sciences in Bibinagar, Hyderabad, has offered housing for MBBS students.

Currently, the campus has three boys hostel wings and two girls hostel wings that house 50 second-year students (35 males and 15 girls) and 62 first-year MBBS students (33 boys and 29 girls).

The hostels for First MBBS students are on the second level of the building, while the hostels for Second MBBS students are on the first.
campus_facilities:
Library:
The books and general reading part is on the lower floor, the reading section is on the middle floor, and the state-of-the-art e-library and journal section is on the top floor.
The library has around 8000 medical and nursing books as well as about 900 general topic books.
There is internet access via Wi-Fi.

Sports:
Students have access to a well-equipped gym that includes a treadmill, an aerofit 8806, and push-up bars, among other things.
Tennis courts, football fields, badminton courts, volleyball courts, and cricket grounds are all available on the premises of hostels.
Students' common areas also have indoor games like table tennis, chess, and carrom boards.
Students take evening walks while listening to instrumental music on the walking track in the rainbow park encircling the colourful fountain.
overview:
ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES, BIBINAGAR
AIIMS, Bibinagar is one of the apex healthcare institutes being established by the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India under the PMSSY.
To facilitate the creation of very important institutions in the country, the Government of India has legislated AIIMS Act under which AIIMS are established.
In terms of the provisions of the Act, these new AIIMS are called Institutes of National Importance and are to function as Autonomous Institutions under Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India
